programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Behaviourist Jackson Galaxy helps a young man deal with his cat phobia. He also returns to Colorado to keep his favourite kitten from the shelter

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy deals with his most vicious feline attack in years, at the claws of troubled cat May. He also helps a nervous wreck of a guardian move her feral cats to Canada

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: The game wardens in south-west Texas struggle to catch a deer before it hurts itself, before investigating a call about a man impersonating the officers

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: Treehouse Masters

programme.title: Speed of Life
programme.desc: Super-slow motion images reveal the intricacies of daily life in the natural world, including a lynx-like cat plucking a bird from the air and a praying mantis seizing its prey

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Spring arrives in Alaska, and with the winter season now over, there are many pressing tasks to complete on the homestead, including the need to restock dwindling food supplies

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Severe weather hits Gold Run and tensions arise between the women and their miners. To make progress, the team members must put their problems aside and move on

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A couple witness a shadowy figure in their flat, and discover that dying patients were housed there in the 1900s

programme.title: Must Love Cats

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: In Yorkshire, PC Fletchers dog Patto gets injured chasing a burglar. In Merseyside, PC Harris and his dog Kane try to track down the driver of a stolen car

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete Nelson seeks out the most wonderful arboreal structures in the world, showing how each has been influenced by different artistic movements

programme.title: Animal Cops San Francisco
programme.desc: Rottweilers are seized following a fatal attack on their neighbours dog and guinea pigs, and the team tries to rescue a kitten trapped in a carcass-strewn junkyard

programme.title: Animal Cops San Francisco
programme.desc: A litter of puppies is struck by the parvo virus, while officers shoot to kill when a cop is attacked by a vicious dog

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Two best friends and room-mates clash when one is terrorised by the others cat, Buddha. Plus, a couple take to sleeping in separate beds because of troublesome feline Dylan

programme.title: Fish or Die
programme.desc: The anglers travel to Milne Day off the eastern tip of Papua New Guinea, the rumoured home to huge schools of the giant trevally. The crew try to hook one on a fly rod

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The brothers-in-law get a call from one of their favourite customers, retired basketball star Shaquille ONeal, who loves his first aquarium is back for a second one

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Houston SPCA officers rescue a seriously underweight young mare from cruelty

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Investigators recall their work in the aftermath of Hurricane Rita, when the Houston SPCA launched one of the biggest animal rescue operations America has seen

programme.title: Must Love Cats
programme.desc: John visits the students at Kitty Kindergarten, investigates the latest smartphone apps for high-tech felines, and discovers how cats can survive falls from great heights

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tia presents a behind-the-scenes look at some of her favourite rescues and adoptions from the season, including some never before-seen-footage

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: A hyperactive Persian cat suddenly collapses while playing, and Jackson sees if a pet that has been exiled from the family home is ready to come back indoors

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy visits a blind cat suffering in a chaotic living environment. He also meets Jude - a good-tempered feline during the day, but nasty at night-time

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Hunt Country wardens investigate rumours of wolves being kept as pets. Turtles are released back into the sea and there are reports of donkeys being shot

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff and the team head to Mexico to offer free veterinary care for poor families. Over one gruelling week they treat hundreds of animals in need

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.sub-title: Shaq Takes it to the Trees!
programme.desc: Pete builds an all-star speakeasy for basketball legend Shaquille ONeal, creating a decagonal structure with soaring ceilings and extra-wide stairs

programme.title: My Extreme Animal Phobia
programme.desc: A crippling fear of bats prevents Tom from leaving the house at night, Roxanne will not enter the bathroom by herself for fear of rats, and Laura strives hard to avoid cockroaches

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers brace for summer on the homestead, and Atz Lee visits the forbidding Perl Island for an emergency crash course in wilderness survival

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: SJ heads to Fairbanks, as he entrusts John and his men to continue the Gold Run operation. Meanwhile, already in the city, the women are met with a new set of challenges

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A dark spirit menaces a womans tranquil home, and she worries that it may be a deceased relative who was a master of the occult

programme.title: Project Grizzly
programme.desc: Jeff Watson teaches his grizzlies to forage in the wild, but when Bob slashes him in the arm he is forced to reconsider the difficulty of them leaving the nest

programme.title: Richard E Grants Seven Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Actor Richard E Grant continues his exploration of the origins of the seven cardinal sins by examining pride and highlighting the dramatic effect the trait can have

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: Pete Nelson builds an adventure-themed treehouse for a family of explorers in Pennsylvanias Pocono mountains, packing the two-storey creation with novelties

programme.title: Animal Cops San Francisco
programme.desc: A dog with a large tumour is rescued from a litter-strewn backyard, and Scott sets out to save a pit bull from heavy traffic

programme.title: Animal Cops San Francisco
programme.desc: The team tries to break up an illegal cock-fighting ring, while officer Sadler saves a dog from a fire and Johnson takes urgent action against a cruel pet owner

programme.title: The Mystery of the Desert Kites
programme.desc: Documentary following an international team of archaeologists and researchers as they explore the groups of megastructures that stretch across the Arabian desert. Using cutting-edge technologies, the multidisciplinary team uncovers the history of the desert kites. These structures predate the Egyptian pyramids and Stonehenge, and the teams discoveries shed new light on a little-known period

programme.title: Catching Historys Criminals: The Forensics Story
programme.desc: Surgeon Gabriel Weston explores cases that were cracked by examining the smallest traces of forensic evidence. They include the first murder case solved in the UK based on fingerprint evidence to the patterns of blood in a bedroom which helped overturn an infamous murder conviction. Gabriel also reveals the cutting-edge techniques that are proving vital to catch the killers of today

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Industrial Age
programme.desc: The former steeplejack examines the history of the iron and steel industries, beginning with a visit to Ironbridge Gorge in Shropshire. Fred moves on to the Black Country, where he learns how the anchor for the ill-fated Titanic was made, before getting the chance to drive the biggest steam-powered rolling mill engine he has ever seen

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cummings exploration of the English canal network continues across the Pennines from Marple to Huddersfield, where his journey is hampered by a fallen tree and a leaking lock pound

programme.title: Brideshead Revisited (2008)
programme.desc: A student at Oxford in the 1920s becomes fascinated with the glamorous lives of an aristocratic friend and his sister, but a complex love triangle develops between the three, while their idyllic relationship is threatened by the arrival of the siblings embittered mother. Drama based on Evelyn Waughs novel, starring Matthew Goode, Ben Whishaw, Hayley Atwell and Emma Thompson

programme.title: Face to Face
programme.desc: An edition of the programme from 1960 in which John Freeman interviews author Evelyn Waugh, whose books include Scoop, Brideshead Revisited and Decline and Fall. Despite Waugh being in characteristically obstructive frame of mind, the result is a rare glimpse into the life and temperament of one of the greatest novelists of the 20th century

programme.title: Helen Mirren Remembers - Gosford Park
programme.desc: Helen Mirren looks back on her role in Robert Altmans acclaimed and multi-award winning 2001 film - Gosford Park. Written by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes, the murder-mystery tapped into that same world of servants and masters and saw Helen joining an all-star, ensemble cast that featured Maggie Smith, Michael Gambon, Alan Bates, and more acting greats

programme.title: Gosford Park (2001)
programme.desc: A weekend shooting party at a country estate is disrupted by a murder. As the numerous guests deal with their own personal agendas, their actions are quietly observed by their servants, notably an inquisitive maid, who drink in the scandalous gossip while maintaining their own strict social hierarchy. Robert Altmans period drama, starring Maggie Smith, Helen Mirren, Kelly Macdonald, Michael Gambon, Clive Owen and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents a rundown of hits from the top 20, including Texass Summer Son, Supergrasss Moving and Alice Deejays Better Off Alone. Plus, Geri Halliwell sings Mi Chico Latino in a performance from the archives. First broadcast August 26, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, including performances from Geri Halliwell, Ocean Colour Scene, Another Level featuring Tq, A-teens, and Lou Bega. First broadcast September 3, 1999

programme.title: Hunt for the Oldest DNA
programme.desc: Film following a team of scientists in their quest to find ancient genetic material, the discovery of which could have massive implications for how the past is understood. This documentary also reveals the genes of long-extinct creatures that once thrived in warm, lush Arctic landscapes

programme.title: Fred Dibnahs Industrial Age
programme.desc: The former steeplejack examines the history of the iron and steel industries, beginning with a visit to Ironbridge Gorge in Shropshire. Fred moves on to the Black Country, where he learns how the anchor for the ill-fated Titanic was made, before getting the chance to drive the biggest steam-powered rolling mill engine he has ever seen

programme.title: Building Britains Biggest Nuclear Power Station
programme.desc: Part one of two. Following the challenges involved with building the Hinkley Point C in the remote Somerset countryside, the first new nuclear power station in Britain for a generation. This series follows the engineers, technicians, and the behind-the-scenes staff who are under pressure to keep the project on track, including building the mammoth foundations for the two nuclear reactors, and excavating cooling water tunnels out under the Bristol Channel

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents a rundown of hits from the top 20, including Texass Summer Son, Supergrasss Moving and Alice Deejays Better Off Alone. Plus, Geri Halliwell sings Mi Chico Latino in a performance from the archives. First broadcast August 26, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, including performances from Geri Halliwell, Ocean Colour Scene, Another Level featuring Tq, A-teens, and Lou Bega. First broadcast September 3, 1999

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Janice Long and John Peel present an edition first aired on 3 April, featuring performances by Big Audio Dynamite, George Michael, A-Ha, the Real Thing, Cliff Richard and the Young Ones, the Style Council and Falco

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Anthea Turner presents the edition first aired on April 11 1991. Featuring performances by the Wonderstuff, Alison Limerick, Gary Clail On-U Sound System, Mike and the Mechanics, Dannii Minogue, Madonna, Monie Love versus Adeva, Chesney Hawkes and the Shamen

programme.title: Shania Twain at the BBC
programme.desc: A collection featuring all of the Canadian singer-songwriters biggest moments from the BBC archives. Including live performances, her earliest UK TV appearances from the days of debut hit Youre Still the One, and classics That Dont Impress Me Much and Man! I Feel Like a Woman!

programme.title: Reel Stories: Shania Twain
programme.desc: The singer meets up with Dermot OLeary in a London cinema to reflect on the pivotal moments in her life and career, in a recording made ahead of her debut at Glastonbury in 2024. Shania speaks about performing on TV shows across Canada during her teenage years and recalls working as a performer at Deerhurst Resort in Ontario to support her siblings after her mother and stepfather died

programme.title: Glastonbury
programme.desc: Clara Amfo and Lauren Laverne present as Canadian country pop singer-songwriter takes to the Pyramid Stage for the famous Glastonbury teatime Legends slot, following in the footsteps of the likes of Dolly Parton, Diana Ross, Tony Bennett, Tom Jones and Kylie Minogue. Fans can no doubt expect hits including Man! I Feel Like a Woman, That Dont Impress Me Much and Youre Still the One

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: After listening to Emmets piano playing from her garden, stopping a passer-by to listen with her and rebuking Liz for collecting milk in her dressing gown, Hyacinth receives a phone call from Mrs Fortescue asking for a lift into town

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy asks his sister to help in his bid to leave his henpecking mother. Assisted by Timothys best friend Frank, they escape, but soon his parents give chase and freedom seems unlikely

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Janice Long and John Peel present an edition first aired on 3 April, featuring performances by Big Audio Dynamite, George Michael, A-Ha, the Real Thing, Cliff Richard and the Young Ones, the Style Council and Falco

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Anthea Turner presents the edition first aired on April 11 1991. Featuring performances by the Wonderstuff, Alison Limerick, Gary Clail On-U Sound System, Mike and the Mechanics, Dannii Minogue, Madonna, Monie Love versus Adeva, Chesney Hawkes and the Shamen

programme.title: Shania Twain at the BBC
programme.desc: A collection featuring all of the Canadian singer-songwriters biggest moments from the BBC archives. Including live performances, her earliest UK TV appearances from the days of debut hit Youre Still the One, and classics That Dont Impress Me Much and Man! I Feel Like a Woman!

programme.title: Reel Stories: Shania Twain
programme.desc: The singer meets up with Dermot OLeary in a London cinema to reflect on the pivotal moments in her life and career, in a recording made ahead of her debut at Glastonbury in 2024. Shania speaks about performing on TV shows across Canada during her teenage years and recalls working as a performer at Deerhurst Resort in Ontario to support her siblings after her mother and stepfather died

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: The keepers introduce a new male to the pack in Wolf Wood and hope he takes to the new matriarch Meg when he arrives. Hamza Yassin uses his lens to attempt to identify the sexes of the most recent wallabies to arrive at the park and Megan McCubbin has her first close-up experience with an aardvark

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Mud Rescue, Farm Arson and Drones That Save Lives
programme.desc: In Leicestershire, farmers and a specialist fire and rescue team race to rescue an elderly horse stuck in mud. Arson devastates a family farm in Lincolnshire, destroying buildings, animal enclosures and years of hard work. As the owners count the cost of the damage, another farmer in Scotland recounts watching her tractor explode into flames after a petrol bomb attack. In Hampshire, reporter Paul Colgan meets the innovators using drones to deliver defibrillators to the most remote corners of the countryside

programme.title: SAS: Catching the Criminals
programme.desc: A team specialising in illegal money-lending works with former SAS leader Billy Billingham and the police to identify, track down and raid a suspected loan sharks premises

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Jacqui and Sarah Greene
programme.desc: Broadcaster Sarah Greene teams up with presenter Jacqui Joseph to explore a three-bedroom terrace in Northampton, where the work is already under way. Dion Dublin is in Stoke-on-Trent to view a three-bedroom detached property undergoing a terrific transformation. Plus, some archives clips, including one of Dions first auction lots, a converted 16th-century chapel

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion hosts as experts Catherine Southon and Kate Bliss go antique hunting in Peterborough, Cambridgeshire, before heading to Lichfield in Staffordshire for the auction. Christina discovers the history of the humble jigsaw puzzles and takes a closer look at a huge collection of puzzles

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Roman Kemp aims to persuade 25-year-old sports fanatic Kerry, who dreams of becoming a Paralympian, that eating beetroot may help her to achieve her goal. Studies show that the vegetable can boost fitness performance and enhance brain power

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.sub-title: A Fortune Hanging on the Wall
programme.desc: A woman decides to sell her late mothers vast collection of antiques in order to help fund renovations to the home she now shares with her stepfather. Auctioneer Izzie Balmer uncovers everything from art nouveau vases to gilded silver tea sets. The star find is a canvas by a celebrated Canadian artist, guaranteed to draw in bidders from around the world. Meanwhile, restorer Robin Johnson explores an outbuilding, where he rescues a ships compass that needs polishing and a church pew buried under cobwebs and bird droppings

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley explores the Wye Valley with a couple whose move is fuelled by a desire to be closer to their grandchildren. Along the way, Ginny visits a family run fermented foods business, where she gets to make her very own kimchi

programme.title: I Made It at Market
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea revisits coppersmith Roy from Wiltshire and jeweller Sarah from Glasgow, to find out about the success they have achieved since visiting his business bootcamp. Roy gave up his job in IT to make a business of his copper creations, while Sarah had to build a new career when a ruptured eardrum meant she had to give up teaching. How are their businesses progressing?

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host the quiz in which Darrell, Alex, Joe, Roseanne and Sanjay race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Tom Allen host the quiz in which contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for a cash prize

programme.title: BBC News at Six; Weather
programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp present the live magazine show featuring a mixture of celebrity chat and stories of interest

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The verdict in Jasmines trial is revealed, Vicki shares her hesitations, and Elaine and Ian hold their campaign launch events

programme.title: Race Across the World
programme.desc: Leaving the tranquillity of Kefalonia behind, the teams race through Greece to reach one of Europes biggest and most vibrant cities, Istanbul, where Europe and Asia collide. As ever, money is tight and just one missed connection can mean disaster. Without mobile phones to help them, the teams have to rely on their wits to make it to the end of the second stage. John Hannah narrates

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: Its week 11, and the final five candidates face a gruelling round of interviews with some of Lord Sugars toughest-talking business associates. As their business plans are picked apart, some contestants hold their own, while others crumble under the pressure. In the boardroom, Alan Sugar has a tough decision to make, as only two can make it through to next weeks grand final

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: Cannabis Cove: Operation Seal Bay
programme.desc: Part one of two. The events of 1983, when a mystery in a small fishing town in west Wales led to the discovery of a drug-smuggling ring. The initial puzzle prompted locals to investigate, only to stumble onto something far bigger than anyone could have imagined. The police investigation that followed led rural detectives on their biggest ever case as they unravelled one of Britains most audacious - and strangest - narcotics conspiracies, involving yachts, speed boats, supercars with hidden panels and mansions with buried treasure

programme.title: Cannabis Cove: Operation Seal Bay
programme.desc: Part two of two. The events following 1983, when a mystery in a small fishing town in west Wales led to the discovery of a drug-smuggling ring. This episode details how the investigation widened worldwide, as detectives closed in on those involved. However, extraordinary scenes developed in a Swansea Crown Court that might have got everyone off the hook. For the first time on television, the only Welsh member of the gang reveals the secrets behind the plan

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: A feud is brewing in the meerkat enclosure - and its a family affair. To try to bring them together and allow them to work out their pecking order, keeper Charlie has a plan. Meanwhile, a lion turns 18. Presented by Ben Fogle, Kate Humble, Hamza Yassin and Megan McCubbin

programme.title: Farm 999
programme.sub-title: Badger Baiters Tracked and Race Against Wildfire
programme.desc: In Northern Ireland, a devastating wildfire tears through the Glens of Antrim, threatening farmland, homes and livestock. As flames spread across the hills, the fire service battle to save buildings, animals and livelihoods. With a drone team and the Irish Air Corps called in, it becomes a race against time to stop the blaze before it consumes everything in its path. In Richmond, North Yorkshire, police close in on a brutal gang of badger baiters, after a tip-off from a local Rural Watch group leads officers to a car full of suspects and a horrific crime scene

programme.title: SAS: Catching the Criminals
programme.desc: Ex-SAS leader Billy Billingham is out on the beat with Cleveland Police, as they seek violent offenders and crack down on antisocial behaviour in the community

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.sub-title: Celebrity Special with Martel and Alex Jones
programme.desc: Martel Maxwell shows TV host Alex Jones around a rather cramped flat in Londons Shepherds Bush. Martin Roberts explores the programmes archive, spotting a Chelsea pad that cost an eye-watering amount even 10 years ago. Dion Dublin visits a Manchester property where a familiar face is looking to spruce it up with the help of his family

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles presents a compilation edition focusing on motoring memorabilia, with items including a vintage stop sign that brought an Oswestry team to an abrupt halt and a duo in Essex who used magic to drive down the price of a luxury car mascot. Eric journeys along the Time Road exhibition at the British Motor Museum and in the Cotswolds, Christina Trevanion goes for a spin at one of Britains most historic racing circuits

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: BBC Newsline; Weather
programme.desc: Local news worth watching from across Northern Ireland

programme.title: BBC News at One; Weather
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The visit of Princess Margaret to Kembleford is jeopardised when a school caretaker is found murdered. It falls to Father Brown to resolve matters and save the royal occasion from being cancelled. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a couple from a town in Cheshire to find their dream home on Anglesey. During a busy week of house-hunting, Jules turns his attention away from property and heads to the Welsh mainland to catch up with a passionate farmer, Gareth Wyn Jones, whose family has been working the land for 375 years

programme.title: I Made It at Market
programme.desc: After welcoming them to his life-changing business bootcamp in the spring of 2022, Dominic Chinea checks in with blacksmith Alex from Northumberland and woodturner Lucinda from Wiltshire. He hears about their amazing success and what their skills are earning them now

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene host the quiz in which Brian, Caroline, Monique, Ryan and Ayotunde race in moving podiums across the studio floor to try to win £5,000. The contenders battle across a series of fast-paced qualifiers and head-to-head races where the aim of the game is simple - to make it to the finish line before their rivals. The winner then races against the track itself in an attempt to win the cash prize

programme.desc: The latest headlines

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: JB Gill and Alex Jones present the usual mix of celebrity guests and stories about people in extraordinary circumstances

programme.title: Extraordinary Portraits
programme.desc: The comedian matches wildlife sanctuary owner Lindsay with celebrity artist and animal lover Ricky Wilson, but the Kaiser Chiefs frontman faces an artistic dilemma. Lindsay wants the portrait to focus on the animals she has dedicated her life to, but Ricky believes it is Lindsay who is extraordinary and should be at the centre of the painting

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When the team attend a Dark Morris Dancing event, Margo finds herself at the centre of a crime when a member of her team collapses during their performance. With a severe allergic reaction to blame, and the victims epi-pen case empty, Humphrey is stumped as to how the attack was triggered unseen while all eyes were on the stage. Death in Paradise spin-off, starring Kris Marshall and Felicity Montagu

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Monty Don hosts, with guest panellists comedian Chris McCausland and journalist Helen Lewis joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop to delve into the latest news

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: The lads decide its time to expand their empire in Cork city, as their days of doing all the hard work are over - they plan on being the bosses now. Starring Alex Murphy and Hilary Rose

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: A round-up of todays headlines

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by Oscar-nominated star of Schindlers List, Ralph Fiennes, who is on the sofa to talk about his play Grace Pervades. Comedy actress Anna Faris returns to the world of Scary Movie for the next instalment in the spoof-horror franchise. Olivia Cooke, star of Amazon Primes The Girlfriend, talks about the upcoming series in the Game of Thrones prequel, House of the Dragon, and comedian Michelle de Swarte tells Claudia about her stand-up tour The Afters

programme.title: Something in the Water (2024)
programme.desc: A group of five friends must fight for their lives in open water after a dream wedding turns into a nightmare. Shark-survival thriller, starring Hiftu Quasem, Natalie Mitson, Ellouise Shakespeare-Hart and Nicole Rieko Setsuko

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy meets with island police and is given CCTV footage that has never been released, showing Sarms last known movements with her boyfriend, Ryan Bane

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Tir Dhondy searches for the yacht Sarm vanished from, and tracks down Ryan Banes ex-wife, hearing first-hand about her experiences while married to him

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police connect the suicide of a 12-year-old girl in West Virginia to Alexander McCartney, opening a manslaughter investigation but in order to charge him they have to prove he foresaw the risk to her life. The case sets a new legal precedent in the UK and more than five years after the investigation began, McCartney is finally convicted and sentenced

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test-drive an Aston Martin DBS Convertible, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Convertible through Romania, searching for the mountain highway built during the reign of the countrys former dictator Nicolae Ceausescu - allegedly the best road to drive on in the world. Actor Eric Bana is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Surviving Americas Most Hated Family
programme.desc: Thirteen years since first encountering one of Americas most notorious hate groups, award-winning film-maker Louis Theroux makes a long-anticipated return to Kansas to spend time with the Westboro Baptist Church - a hugely-controversial Christian ministry that for years has picketed at military funerals and other high-profile events with deliberately provocative and homophobic placards. Immersing himself in the strange world of Westboro, Louis explores what happens when a hate-group largely populated by one family loses its patriarch

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall plays football with cheetahs, learns about the hunting techniques of crowned eagles and films three lethal snakes - a cobra, a boomslang and a puff adder

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall and the team return to Mexico to search for more dangerous creatures, including a crocodile with a nasty bite and one of the worlds most vicious sharks

programme.title: Big Night of Musicals 2026 by the National Lottery
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the annual showcase of musical theatre from the AO Arena in Manchester, featuring a preview of forthcoming new West End productions of Miss Saigon and Jesus Christ Superstar, with Sam Ryder making his debut as Jesus. Featuring Alexandra Burke performing numbers from Im Every Woman: The Chaka Khan Musical, hits from The Producers, Wicked, The Lion King, Oliver!, Sunny Afternoon and Paddington The Musical, and a performance from Annie featuring La Voix

programme.title: In the Heights (2021)
programme.desc: Film version of the Broadway musical in which Usnavi, a sympathetic New York bodega owner in the neighbourhood of Washington Heights on the northern tip of Manhattan, saves every penny every day as he imagines and sings about a better life. Musical, starring Anthony Ramos, Corey Hawkins and Leslie Grace

programme.title: Missing in Paradise: Searching for Sarm
programme.desc: Journalist Tir Dhondy investigates the disappearance of Sarm Heslop, who went missing from a luxury Caribbean charter yacht in 2021. Tire retraces Sarms last known movements and tracks down two boat captains whose vessels were moored near the yacht she vanished from. Also, she gets to question Ryan Banes, Sarms boyfriend, account of what happened what happened through his lawyer David Cattie

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its the day of the election, and Femi prepares to take on Cheddar. With a lot riding on his success, Femi recruits the help of a reluctant Toby, who is dealing with his own crisis. Omar has a daring plan, while Leah is pulled away from Benjamin by a struggling Felix

programme.title: P Diddy: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Yinka Bokinni investigates how Sean Combs has gone from being the worlds biggest hip-hop mogul to haemorrhaging money, businesses, friends and fans in a matter of months. Yinka will examine how Combs made it to the top, and what some may have turned a blind eye to along the way. Speaking to some of Combs inner circle, and biggest critics, Yinka will find out what they think about him and ask why so many are only speaking out now

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: The case of an online catfishing abuse incident, which saw a 20-year-old suspect accused by a 12-year-old girl in Scotland. The suspects bail conditions were supposed to prevent him from accessing the internet, but he very quickly was the subject of a second accusation from New Zealand, with online activity traced back to his house

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police re-arrest Alexander McCartney after discovering thousands of images of child abuse on his electronic devices and a multi-agency international investigation begins when the US Department of Homeland Security learn of two more catfishing victims. With McCartney due in court to plead guilty to charges of making indecent images of children and blackmail, the case takes a turn when an obituary page for one of his victims is found

programme.title: Teen Predator/Online Killer
programme.desc: Police connect the suicide of a 12-year-old girl in West Virginia to Alexander McCartney, opening a manslaughter investigation but in order to charge him they have to prove he foresaw the risk to her life. The case sets a new legal precedent in the UK and more than five years after the investigation began, McCartney is finally convicted and sentenced

programme.title: The Catch Up
programme.desc: A round-up of the days news

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Sports mockumentary about GB Paralympian Darren Silverstone, who stole the hearts of a nation before his infamous chokey-o in Tokyo. For the first time, he tells his story - and starts his glorious comeback

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve Backshall returns to find the deadliest animals in Australia, focusing on saltwater crocodiles, snakes and the box jellyfish

programme.title: Wallace and Gromit: Vengeance Most Fowl (2024)
programme.desc: After a recent crime wave hits gardeners across the region, Wallace and his pre-programmed smart gnome, Norbot, are the main suspects. While the inventor proclaims his innocence, its up to faithful hound Gromit to battle sinister forces. Despite being locked up for his previous crimes, a certain penguin might have something to do with recent events. Animated adventure, with the voices of Ben Whitehead, Reece Shearsmith and Peter Kay

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Commissioner Selwyn Patterson struggles in the wake of his shock shooting, and the local community is rocked by a murder at a care home when a game of bingo gets horribly out of hand. But could someone really kill over something so trivial? As the case takes on a series of jaw-dropping twists and turns, Neville and the team realise that this case is so much more than it first appeared on the surface. Hayley Mills guest stars

programme.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds and Snakes (2023)
programme.desc: Coriolanus Snow, a young man who will go on to become the tyrannical ruler of the Panem civilisation, is assigned to mentor a contender in the 10th ritual games. He finds himself torn between his feelings for his protegee and the opportunity to turn his familys failing fortunes around. Sci-fi adventure prequel, with Tom Blyth, Rachel Zegler, Viola Davis and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Funboys
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Ballymacnoose
programme.desc: Following a gas leak at his flat, Callum moves in with Lorcan and his father Sammy, widely regarded as Ballymacnooses biggest rotter. Driven by a desire to no longer be a pushover and in a desperate attempt to get over his break-up with Gemma, Callum goes under Sammys wing and unleashes his own inner swine. Meanwhile, Jordans two fathers are finally tying the knot and he becomes wrapped up in all the excitement of the wedding. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Funboys
programme.desc: With Callum now unwelcome at Boggins farm and his flat still out of bounds because of a gas leak, he turns once more to his oldest, dearest friend, Jordan. Things seem to be going well - Jordans two fathers show Callum some much-needed sympathy and introduce him to the foreign concept of talking about his feelings. Unfortunately this new-found bond doesnt go down so well with the other member of the house - Jordan. Meanwhile, Gemma brings home a pet and unwittingly causes Lorcan to relive some very painful memories. Comedy, with Ryan Dylan and Rian Lennon

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its the final exams, and everyone is feeling the pressure. Leah is stressed that Felix will drag her down, but things are about to get a lot worse for them both. Toby makes a big play to try and cling on to his Cambridge offer and keep Abby. Femi is threatened by Cheddar, but Pixie helps him fight back. On the pitch, the hockey girls face their rivals, while Omars secret whips up the tension

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its nearly time for the boarders to say goodbye to St Gilberts. Femi is forced to choose between love and ambition, Omar finally tries to right his wrongs, and Toby makes a life-changing decision. With only one exam left to go, Leah cracks under the pressure. Can her friends bring her back from the brink? Final episode of the sitcom

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: An aspiring comedian must choose between sanitising his set and embracing his voice after a controversial performance results in further gigs being cancelled

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May test-drive an Aston Martin DBS Convertible, a Ferrari California and a Lamborghini Gallardo Convertible through Romania, searching for the mountain highway built during the reign of the countrys former dictator Nicolae Ceausescu - allegedly the best road to drive on in the world. Actor Eric Bana is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Killing Sherlock: Lucy Worsley on the Case of Conan Doyle
programme.desc: The historian investigates why Arthur Conan Doyle brought Sherlock Holmes back to life and finds that the darkness of the later stories mirrored the reality of the authors life. After the loss of his eldest son, he became an evangelist for spiritualism, and while his star declined after a public spat with the magician Houdini, Holmes by contrast found a life beyond his author on stage and screen

programme.title: Murder Case
programme.sub-title: The Hunt for Arlene Frasers Killer - Part Two
programme.desc: The concluding part charts a decades-long quest for justice, as Arlenes family and the police fight through courtrooms and appeals to uncover the truth about her disappearance. The police investigation is rigorously tested through two murder trials and a dramatic appeals process, with the process going from the High Court in Edinburgh in 2003 to the Scottish Parliament in 2025, where Arlenes sister Carol continued her determined campaign to uncover the truth about what happened

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: A couple are targeted by a burglar who repeatedly sneaks back in to clean up without a trace. With several potential suspects, Humphrey must uncover who is out for revenge. Kelby tries to help a young teen held captive in a garden shed and Ester wrestles with a tension headache. Despite putting fostering on pause, Humphrey and Martha find the decision at the forefront of their minds

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Sonali Shah helps Norman and Linda swap London for a breath of fresh sea air in Dorset - and the line-up of properties includes a mystery house that die-hard fans of the show might just recognise. Sonali also takes a break from house hunting to unwind at a rejuvenating seaweed spa

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two families go head-to-head at a Staffordshire antiques fair, aided by John Cameron and Irita Marriott, and Natasha Raskin Sharp indulges her passion for Arts and Crafts jewellery

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: With a long Easter weekend to look forward to, Monty Don is on hand with practical gardening advice and inspiration, including how to get potatoes in the ground if you fancy growing them. Hell also be sowing seeds for a colourful cut flower display, and starting a new project to show how easy and inexpensive it is to create topiary from yew cuttings. Ashley Edwards heads to a magical spring garden in Horsham to share his love of the season of renewal while, in Carmarthenshire, theres a grower who gave up her job in London to follow her dream of becoming a flower farmer

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts the game show in which 24 recurring contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts a quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.title: Clive Myries Italian Road Trip
programme.desc: Clive travels to the Conegliano region in the foothills of the Alps, to find out about the production of his favourite tipple Prosecco. One of the countrys few female female wine-makers explains about the grapes they use - and when the importance of the harvest - before inviting him to spend the night in a giant wine barrel. Moving on, vintage car fan Clive joins the 100 Miglia rally and hunts for antiques in the hilltop town of Asolo

programme.title: Hidden Kingdoms
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on small creatures in an urban setting. In Rio de Janeiro, marmosets use power-lines as they would tree branches to scour the streets for food, and one animal becomes separated from its group and is forced to the ground, where it confronts the dangers of the city alone. Almost 11,000 miles away in the neon metropolis of Tokyo, a rhinoceros beetle begins an extraordinary journey to find sanctuary on a rare patch of greenery, along the way facing predatory bats, eight-eyed jumping spiders, praying mantises and a sharp-eyed crow. Including Hidden Kingdoms Revealed, showing how the film was made. Narrated by Stephen Fry

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits Kettering, Northamptonshire, where the host of antique treasures includes a guitar once owned by Frank Ifield, an assortment of gruesome surgical instruments, two Russian Imperial Easter eggs, paintings by artist Alfred East and a large collection of brooches made from military collar badges. Presented by Michael Aspel

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Mark Stacey and David Fletcher value items in Dorchester, Dorset, including a 1938 autographed cricket bat and an unusual Clarice Cliff plate. Presenter Paul Martin visits the Tank Museum at Bovington Camp, where he explores the history of the armoured vehicle from the First World War to the present day

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Michael Ball, Jodie Prenger, Laurence Rickard and Snoochie Shy test their general knowledge skills in the penultimate round of trivia-based games

programme.title: Ronan Keatings Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan travels north for the next stop of his Wild Atlantic journey. He explores the north west coast with his friend, the artist Terry Bradley. He also does some fossil hunting to find the materials to make some extraordinary jewellery, and he doesnt miss a chance to get on stage to duet with singer Claudia Buckley in one of Donegals buzzing country music venues

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Judging
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from London and south-east England must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. Actor Simon Callow helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Adam and Lucy have a bold idea to save on feed costs, but it means persuading their dairy cows to adopt beef calves and let them suckle. Emma and Rob are taking a holiday before the busy season kicks in, but first they need to get Emmas parents up to speed on running the farm. Low lamb numbers for another crofter give Ally cause for concern about when to release his own back out to the hills

programme.title: Inside Barlinnie
programme.desc: Part one of two. Return of the documentary that charts the lives of prisoners and staff at Scotlands largest jail. Known drug user JP is rushed to hospital after collapsing from an overdose in the exercise yard, while Norry threatens suicide while coming to terms with his childhood and one of Scotlands most violent inmates turns to religion to try to turn his life around

programme.title: The Apprentice: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: As Lord Sugar continues his search for a new business partner, Angela Scanlon and her guests take a deep dive into the candidates performances in the interview stage of the competition, before meeting the three candidates who didnt make the cut

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Insights and global interviews on the crucial news stories of the day with Katie Razzall

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: The Misadventures of Romesh Ranganathan
programme.desc: The comedian returns to visit another selection of unusual destinations, beginning in the West African country of Sierra Leone. He ventures through spectacular national parks hoping to witness extraordinary and rare wildlife, including the elusive pygmy hippo, and also samples the national drink of poyo, takes in miles of incredible beaches, and meets locals living truly off-grid

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle
programme.desc: Barra Best travels along the Foyle river network, criss-crossing his way across the many rivers and streams that make up its great catchment

programme.title: Kegworth: Flight to Disaster
programme.desc: Survivors and eyewitnesses recount the moment British Midland Airways Flight 092, travelling from London to Belfast, ran into difficulties in January 1989. The Boeing 737-400 crashed onto the motorway embankment between the M1 and A453 near Kegworth, Leicestershire. Rare archive footage and expert analysis uncovers the chain of decisions that sealed the fate of 47 passengers and injured dozens more

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs from London and south-east England cook mains and desserts. Their creations are judged by veteran judge Aktar Islam. Dishes include 28-day dry aged duck inspired by 28 Days Later and a peanut and salted caramel parfait that serves as a tribute to the BAFTAs

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Under pressure from her mother, Mary weighs up an unconventional offer from Mr Ryder. As she grapples with what she truly wants, Lizzy and Mr Collins help her to chart her own course. But just as she thinks shes taken her future into her own hands, a surprise visit from her aunt and uncle leaves everyone reeling

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie looks at the health benefits of press-ups. He meets Cardiff business owner Shalize, who is concerned about her familys history of type 2 diabetes. Clive suggests that if she does press-ups on a regular basis, the science shows they could reduce the risk of diabetes, lower blood pressure and even help her live longer

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson meets a couple who have spent a few decades in Australia, but have decided to swap the surf and sunshine for the lovely views and charm of Cornwall. He also visits an abandoned slate quarry that has been transformed into an extraordinary off-grid retreat, full of creativity and coastal magic

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Zoe Ball, Roman Kemp and Clive Myrie show how small, everyday changes can boost wellbeing, from dancing to lift your mood to enjoying mackerel for a healthier heart. In the first episode, Clive prescribes a diet of oily fish for a woman on a mission to supercharge her health after shedding weight with the help of weight loss drugs

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Sheffield empty nesters Siva and Dhami are feeling stuck in a rut so Roman Kemp arrives to shake things up - literally. He shows them how taking up dancing could do far more than just put a spring in their step. Research reveals that adding dance to a weekly routine could boost fitness, increase brain power and lift a persons mood. Will a little rhythm rewrite their whole routine?

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which contestants compete for the chance to win £10,000, with a single impossible answer knocking them out for the day

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight players do battle in the knockout quiz. Only one will be left standing at the end, hoping to reach the Golden Run and double their money. Hosted by Alex Scott

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons hosts a quick-fire quiz in which six contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions

programme.title: Clive Myries Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: The newsreader goes on a trip to reconnect with family, explore his heritage and experience the rich mix of cultures that makes island life so special. Clive begins by meeting up with his sister and exploring the wild beauty of eastern Jamaica, encountering descendants of rebel mountain communities, visiting a high-altitude coffee farm, learning the secrets of jerk pork and bedding down 100ft above the Caribbean Sea

programme.title: Natures Epic Journeys
programme.desc: Documentary following a thousand elephants as they come together in a crucial gathering in northern Kenya, while facing threats from both predators and poachers. Liz Bonnin and a team of scientists and filmmakers use cutting-edge tracking technology to follow individual elephants as they cope with daily challenges and make the most of this unique, short-lived gathering. They also capture surprising new behaviour and witness how the elephant society responds to poaching, including the way in which young elephants cope with the loss of their parents

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel presents from Haywards Heath in West Sussex, where a ventriloquists dummy makes an appearance after 30 years in a box, and an innocent-looking, silver-topped walking stick proves to contain two feet of deadly Toledo steel. Expert Christopher Payne also reveals a table that could have been worth more if it had been made on the right side of the Atlantic

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Compilation edition revisiting some of the historic venues from the series and offering some new valuations and unexpected auctions. Paul Martin visits Rodmarton Manor, an extraordinary Arts and Crafts house in the Cotswolds

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: Michael Ball, Jodie Prenger, Laurence Rickard and Snoochie Shy test their general knowledge skills before the days winner, and the weeks overall victor is revealed

programme.title: Ronan Keatings Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan completes this leg of his journey along Irelands Wild Atlantic in County Derry/Londonderry. He walks the 400-year-old walls of the city of Derry/Londonderry with comedian Diona Doherty. He also hits the farm to find out what it takes to be a competitive sheep herder, before heading for the windswept coastline of Castlerock to meet a skilled craft worker who builds traditional coracle boats by hand

programme.title: Greatest Gardens with Diarmuid Gavin and Carol Klein
programme.desc: A search for Northern Irelands finest gardens, with Diarmuid and Carol joined by guest judge Prue Leith for the first edition. They visit Fernhill Garden in Ballynahinch, Co Down, which is filled with more than 4,000 plants, before heading to Co Antrim for a suburban garden in Jordanstown and a six-acre farmhouse garden near Crumlin

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: The team looks ahead to summer days in the garden, with Lizzie Schofield pruning and planting in her sitooterie area, while Brian Cunningham has a beginners guide to starting a productive vegetable plot. Lizzie reveals which varieties of tomatoes she has picked for 2026 and is also the first of the team to start work on her competition garden, based on planting that appeals to one of the senses

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Frances Tophill returns to Damson Farm, and shares research from the RSPB on how to support garden birds. She also reveals how to make the most of sowing older seeds, and gets hands-on preparing vibrant container displays ready for the sunny days ahead. Toby Buckland explains how to make the most of outdoor spaces. And Joe Swift travels to the Cornish coast to meet a gardener who proves that even the wildest seaside weather cant stop a true planting paradise

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: A new generation of big cats is coming of age. First-time lion mum Seramis tiny cubs surprise the crew and could mark a split in the Xudum pride. Its time for Mathata and the oldest cubs in the pride to pull their weight. Pobe the cheetah makes a welcome return with her surviving cub Bo, and he finally shows the team what hes made of

programme.title: Live at the Apollo
programme.sub-title: Gina Yashere, Lost Voice Guy, Ed Gamble
programme.desc: Gina Yashere comperes the comedy show at Londons Hammersmith Apollo. She warms up the audience before introducing routines by 2018 Britains Got Talent winner Lost Voice Guy and former Mock the Week regular Ed Gamble

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Analysis of the days events with Nick Watt

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Tenet (2020)
programme.desc: A troubleshooter is hired for a high-stakes mission to prevent armageddon. As he navigates through a world of espionage, Protagonist uncovers a shadowy organisation with the ability to manipulate time. Racing against the clock, whichever way its ticking, he must master the concept of inversion to thwart the catastrophic future. Christopher Nolans mind-bending fantasy action thriller, starring John David Washington, Kenneth Branagh and Elizabeth Debicki

programme.title: One Fine Morning (2022)
programme.desc: Working as a freelance interpreter, single mother Sandra lives with her eight-year-old daughter in Paris. As she comes to terms with the painful deterioration of her father, who is suffering from a rare form of dementia, she runs into Clement, an old friend, and they embark on an affair. Romantic drama, starring Lea Seydoux. In French and German

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: London and South East England: Judging
programme.desc: The two highest-scoring chefs from London and south-east England must go head-to-head and cook their six-course menus again. Actor Simon Callow helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver presents

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: A new generation of big cats is coming of age. First-time lion mum Seramis tiny cubs surprise the crew and could mark a split in the Xudum pride. Its time for Mathata and the oldest cubs in the pride to pull their weight. Pobe the cheetah makes a welcome return with her surviving cub Bo, and he finally shows the team what hes made of

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary joins the Gardiners in the Lake District, hoping for clarity and calm. She reconnects with Mr Hayward, and they bond over poetry and nature. But just as it seems as though they might finally declare their feelings for one another, Mr Ryder arrives to disrupt proceedings, with Caroline Bingley in tow

programme.title: Global Eye
programme.desc: Investigations from BBC correspondents all over the world, revealing secrets, rooting out injustice and exposing crime, corruption and abuse

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Curse of Skinwalker Ranch
programme.desc: When the team deploys a cutting-edge new technology on Skinwalker Ranch to study the mysterious Bubble, it leads to an unsettling revelation

programme.title: UFO POV
programme.desc: Eye-witness accounts and footage, plus expert analysis and innovative special effects show what UFOs might see from their own perspective. Featuring an array of opinions from a very select group of specialists

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: For 10 seasons, this series has collected dozens of reports of encounters with strange and mysterious beasts. Now, ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio Tsoukalos selects his top 10 extraordinary creatures

programme.title: Strange Evidence
programme.desc: An Oregon highway is filmed spattered with a bizarre white goo, filled with writhing snake-like creatures. Residents of Slavic Village in Ohio film massive explosions and flashes going off at night around their normally quiet suburban neighbourhood

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: The Golds have the opportunity of a lifetime when they stumble upon pieces of art that could be worth millions. Documentary series following the daily running of a pawn shop

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: Les hands out his biggest loan ever on a luxurious Rolls-Royce, hoping this latest gamble will pay off and not leave his ego in tatters

programme.title: Hardcore Pawn
programme.desc: When Les puts the kibosh on Seths outlandish plan to boost business, father and son head to the race track to decide whos boss. Documentary series following the daily running of a pawn shop

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and his team of antiques dealers visit Barrow-in-Furness, Cumbria, to help members of the public sort the treasures from their trash. Tim Hogarth is joined by an aspiring dealer who knows what hes talking about, and Stewart Hofgartner meets a seller who brings in a bargain buy

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
