programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of property-hunters in Buckinghamshire and Berkshire. Having booked almost 40 viewings without success, newlyweds Hannah and Hassan want a four-bedroom house in the High Wycombe area with space for a full-size snooker table, while in Reading, sisters Gemma and Lucy insist on two of everything, from bedrooms and bathrooms to parking spaces

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets Duncan and Josie, who are taking on an 18th-century barn perched on the edge of a pretty green, containing some very dodgy decor including a purple striped 80s kitchen and a miniature kitchen extension built to house a washing machine. Duncan and Josie need to make it liveable very quickly as they welcome their new baby Ruby, so George sets out to make the dark, cramped layout work for modern family living. He also heads to Southport, Merseyside, to see a Victorian gothic property in need of attention. Owners Jenny and Fadi are keen to resore the pile to its original splendor

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: American TV host Dick Cavett persuades Sam to write his autobiography, convincing him it would be a sure-fire bestseller, and Diane reluctantly agrees to help with the manuscript. Meanwhile, an old flame of Veras is back on the scene, to Norms annoyance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee? Let Me Call You Back
programme.desc: Sam tells Diane he loves her, but she takes his declaration far more seriously than he intended and the pair end up taking some time off from their romance.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dianes friend Heather flirts aggressively with Sam, making him uncomfortable - but Diane claims he is overreacting to perfectly ordinary social behaviour. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Shelley Long

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In a bid to outdo Maries culinary skills, Debra goes against tradition by serving a fish dish on Thanksgiving. Not to be upstaged, her meddling mother-in-law turns up with a turkey. Comedy, starring Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert is ousted as captain of Nemos basketball team, so Ray replaces him and begins devoting all his time to coaching - leading Debra to accuse him of neglecting the children

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray learns the autographed baseball he has treasured since his father gave it to him as a child is a forgery, and is so shocked that he decides to tell daughter Ally the truth about Father Christmas

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Seattle shrink agrees to escort Lana, his former high-school prom queen, to her surprise birthday party - but his ultimate goal is actually to spend time with her attractive friend Claire. Comedy, guest starring Jean Smart and Patricia Clarkson, with Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. The shrink agrees to tutor a teenager in exchange for a date with Claire, while Roz is rewarded with a day off for taking the youngster to the prom. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Peri Gilpin and Jean Smart

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles becomes jealous when Daphne meets a dog-lover while out with Eddie. Martin secretly attends the parole hearing of the man who shot him. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink is mortified when he learns Niles, Martin and Daphne are planning to go along on his trip to Belize with Claire. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce, John Mahoney and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarellas in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leones in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Having spent the past couple of years working flat out at their Durham hill farm, Matt Baker treats his parents, Janice and Mike, to a few excursions in their beloved North East. They begin at Bamburgh Castle Estate, where Matt learns about some antique engineering, tea-loving Janice learns how to blend Earl Grey on the very spot it was invented and Mike has a memorable experience with a vintage luxury car closely linked to the castle

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman heads to Gran Canaria to help Tom from Scotland find the perfect holiday home. Also along to help Tom in his quest is his son Alan, who works with him in the building trade, and would love to visit for family holidays. Working within a budget of £120,000, Ben lines up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Renovations reach a milestone at Tom and Terrys Spanish BandB. In France, everything hinges on an inspectors approval for Paul and Fiona. Changes are afoot at Leah and Joaos Portuguese cocktail bar. And couple Summer and Ashley take on a top-to-bottom renovation in Italy

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys build a wine cave at Château Domaine De La Barde. Alicia and Carlton prepare for their first wedding at Chateau DAran, while Tim and Sasha create a bold, colourful courtyard at Chateau du Puits es Pratx

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: With spirits raised, Jasmine and her husband turn their attention to creating a driveway. The outside staircase finally arrives but installing it doesnt quite go to plan

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: The funnyman climbs into the drivers cab to take charge of some of the worlds most iconic locomotives, learning what it takes to keep them running and meeting the people who keep the railways running. On the Isle of Wight, Paul follows in the footsteps of his tube driver dad by riding up front on the very trains his father would have driven on the Northern Line - now in service on the island. After driving a heritage steam, Paul helps a cow give birth. His journey finishes with a look at how the island was prepared in secret to help with D-Day

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: The Copenhagen Test
programme.desc: Now that his fake life is up and running, Alexander must act like everything is normal - until he discovers the Orphanage plan to use him to sacrifice a real mission to learn more about their enemy. Espionage thriller, starring Simu Liu

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Joanna Page, Armando Iannucci, Kumail Nanjiani and Amy Gledhill leave their dignity at the door to take part in the comedy challenge show. They begin by hunting for a small creature, serving Taskmaster Greg Davies his fruit and vegetables and trying to catch a golden T-shirt - all under the watchful eye of Alex Horne

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The hunt is on for a man who has assaulted an officer and dragged them along with his car before escaping. Sergeant Keith Bennet and PC Chris Turton search for a motorbike thief hiding in a wood in the dead of night. After reports come in of a man loitering in gardens in Birmingham, the team find out not everything is as it seems

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Countdown (2019)
programme.desc: When a young man arrives in hospital after a car accident, claiming to have an app on his phone that predicts the time of a persons death, nurse Quinn and her colleagues decide to download the app for themselves. Things soon turn ugly when Quinn discovers that, according to the countdown app, she only has three days to live. With the clock ticking and a mysterious figure haunting her, she must find a way to save herself before time runs out. Horror, starring Elizabeth Lail

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: Its the final, and just one hunt stands between the four remaining players and a prize of up to £100,000. But the last hunt comes with a fiendish twist and big-money challenges, meaning the players must deploy every ounce of skill, speed and determination to stay in the game

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In north Devon, artist Steve Pleydell-Pearce veers off from his normal coastal hotspots for Spekes Mill Mouth Waterfall, hoping to capture the grandeur and majesty of the landmark. Steeplejack Andrew Tarplee takes on an ancient church tower in the village of Paul in Cornwall, where he abseils down the 800-year-old tower to repair and repaint its clock faces, protecting them from the ravages of time

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets art deco fan Ododu, whos downsized to a Victorian terrace in Brighton but is at a loss about how to connect the kitchen to the garden. For inspiration, he visits Eltham Palace, a showstopping example of deco glamour. George also heads to Stockport, Greater Manchester, to help Sarah, who has just inherited the home she grew up in following her mothers death. With a new baby on the way, shes trying to make the 1890s red brick home work for modern family life, while still preserving some of the features that remind her of her mum

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The bar-room staff and regulars are bequeathed $100,000 by a former customer, but their new-found wealth soon causes friction. Classic comedy, starring Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla asks Sam to be her plus one for her ex-husband Nicks wedding to his glamorous new flame, but Sams appearance makes Nick so jealous that he begs Carla to take him back. Comedy, with Ted Danson and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam regrets letting Diane talk him into asking Norm to sort out his taxes. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and George Wendt

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra comes down with a bad case of flu and takes to her bed, forcing Ray to look after her and the kids. Unfortunately for him, a meeting with a star quarterback complicates matters. Guest starring Terry Bradshaw

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes envious of Roberts good looks and decides the time has come to get a head-to-toe makeover, complete with fake tan. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra learns the second-hand car she bought from Marie and Frank was once the scene of an amorous encounter for a teenage Ray - and promptly decides she does not want it any more. Patricia Heaton and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Don Juan in Hell - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Returning from Belize, Frasier is troubled by a romantic dilemma, uncertain whether he should date Lana or Claire. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: Don Juan in Hell - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As he contemplates ending his relationship with Claire, Frasier finds himself plagued with advice from past girlfriends. Featuring guest appearances by Kelsey Grammers former Cheers co-stars Shelley Long and Bebe Neuwirth

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne is furious to learn Niles is counselling an attractive female patient who is nursing an obsession of her own, while a chirping cricket drives Frasier to distraction. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin prepares for his first nights work as a security guard, and while the gang agonises over who will be landed with walking Eddie, he recalls his traumatic last day as a policeman. To add to their problems, Daphne and Niles each buy a ticket to rival concerts on the same night

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesnt react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later hes still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole visit the Cotswolds, where they unearth a mystery item that looks like a fish tank, but turns out to have a very different use entirely

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: The Bakers visit the Beamish Living Museum, where Matt gets a crash course in driving a 1900s tram and sees how an entire farmhouse has been moved stone by stone. Janice gets to take a Shetland pit-pony for a walk and the family get a busmans holiday lending a hand with some stubborn pigs on a 1940s farm

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Levi Roots in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Spain to help childhood sweethearts Sue and Albert from Chatham, Kent, find their perfect holiday home. The pair first discovered Benalmadena on the Costa del Sol five years ago and instantly fell in love with it, so much so that theyve been back 10 times and now intend to buy a holiday home where they can spend time with their family. Lee lines up five great options for their budget of £190,000. Will Sue and Albert love any of them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A very important guest visits Paul and Fionas villa in France, while couple Summer and Ashley take on even more work in Italy. In Portugal, Louise and Shay look for a new start

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Kathryn and Steve battle to revive their collapsing 14th-century kitchen at Château dAzerat. At Château de Seguenville, Becky and Mark push hard to complete grandad Georges gîte in time for his 80th birthday

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine and Jon reach the final phase of their renovation as the basement transformation nears completion. But they need to start on the kitchen if they want all the work to be done in time for their summer party. And, in an attempt to escape the dust and noise, the couple take a day trip to the local Roman baths, only to find more mud there too

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: Reporter Anja Popp is in Nigeria, home to one of the worlds most prolific film industries, to meet the women risking their livelihoods and reputations to push boundaries on screen

programme.title: Battle of the Brands
programme.sub-title: Primark vs John Lewis: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Kate Quilton explores how department store John Lewis, long-time pillar of middle-class UK, famed for wedding lists and its much talked-about Christmas adverts, has found itself battling against cut-price upstart Primark, with its hit homeware ranges and viral beauty dupes. As wallets tighten, people want a cheap pick-me-up - a lipstick, a quirky mug, a cosy blanket - and these two giants of the high street are going all out to deliver

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: More hopefuls enter the restaurant looking to find the perfect match. Twenty-seven-year-old yoga instructor Nicole meets Matthew, a 24-year-old mindfulness coach. While they seem like the perfect combination for love, how will Nicole, whos only ever dated older men, react to finding out that Matthew is younger than her?

programme.title: Jerry and Marge Go Large (2022)
programme.desc: A couple discover a mathematical loophole in the Massachusetts lottery and win millions to revive and rejuvenate their small town. Comedy drama based on a true story, starring Bryan Cranston, Annette Bening, Rainn Wilson and Larry Wilmore

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a hairy experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Sky Coppers
programme.desc: The hunt is on for a man who has assaulted an officer and dragged them along with his car before escaping. Sergeant Keith Bennet and PC Chris Turton search for a motorbike thief hiding in a wood in the dead of night. After reports come in of a man loitering in gardens in Birmingham, the team find out not everything is as it seems

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The final five players embark on their most important hunt yet. With one player still reeling from losing their last remaining ally, rivalries are at an all-time high and the last two Predators are determined to guarantee their place in the final. But as the Prey desperately try to evade capture, a last-minute move threatens one players place in the contest

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Wendi Peters and Ricky Groves go head to head as they take on lint roller printing, while Sharron Davies and Tanni Grey-Thompson have a slogan banner craft-off

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of property-hunters in Buckinghamshire and Berkshire. Having booked almost 40 viewings without success, newlyweds Hannah and Hassan want a four-bedroom house in the High Wycombe area with space for a full-size snooker table, while in Reading, sisters Gemma and Lucy insist on two of everything, from bedrooms and bathrooms to parking spaces

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect meets Duncan and Josie, who are taking on an 18th-century barn perched on the edge of a pretty green, containing some very dodgy decor including a purple striped 80s kitchen and a miniature kitchen extension built to house a washing machine. Duncan and Josie need to make it liveable very quickly as they welcome their new baby Ruby, so George sets out to make the dark, cramped layout work for modern family living. He also heads to Southport, Merseyside, to see a Victorian gothic property in need of attention. Owners Jenny and Fadi are keen to resore the pile to its original splendor

programme.desc: Daphne is furious to learn Niles is counselling an attractive female patient who is nursing an obsession of her own, while a chirping cricket drives Frasier to distraction. American comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.desc: Martin prepares for his first nights work as a security guard, and while the gang agonises over who will be landed with walking Eddie, he recalls his traumatic last day as a policeman. To add to their problems, Daphne and Niles each buy a ticket to rival concerts on the same night

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

Can the chef break Toms iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to Spain to help childhood sweethearts Sue and Albert from Chatham, Kent, find their perfect holiday home. The pair first discovered Benalmadena on the Costa del Sol five years ago and instantly fell in love with it, so much so that theyve been back 10 times and now intend to buy a holiday home where they can spend time with their family. Lee lines up five great options for their budget of £190,000. Will Sue and Albert love any of them enough to make an offer?

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A very important guest visits Paul and Fionas villa in France, while couple Summer and Ashley take on even more work in Italy. In Portugal, Louise and Shay look for a new start

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Kathryn and Steve battle to revive their collapsing 14th-century kitchen at Château dAzerat. At Château de Seguenville, Becky and Mark push hard to complete grandad Georges gîte in time for his 80th birthday

programme.title: Jasmine Harmans Renovation in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine and Jon reach the final phase of their renovation as the basement transformation nears completion. And, in an attempt to escape the dust and noise, the couple take a day trip to the local Roman baths, only to find more mud there too

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World

programme.title: Battle of the Brands
programme.sub-title: Primark vs John Lewis: Battle of the Brands
programme.desc: Kate Quilton explores how department store John Lewis, long-time pillar of middle-class UK, famed for wedding lists and its much talked-about Christmas adverts, has found itself battling against cut-price upstart Primark, with its hit homeware ranges and viral beauty dupes. As wallets tighten, people want a cheap pick-me-up - a lipstick, a quirky mug, a cosy blanket - and these two giants of the high street are going all out to deliver

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.desc: All of Springfield is outraged when Homer is accused of leaving Santas Little Helper locked in a hot car

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer takes Ned Flanders advice and starts praying regularly, hoping God will lend a sympathetic ear and make it possible for him to buy a better home. Marge warns that his materialistic attitude may incur divine retribution, but he turns a deaf ear - until a flood of biblical proportions hits Springfield

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)
programme.desc: Pete Maverick Mitchell returns to the Top Gun Instructor programme, where he must confront his past as he trains a group of younger pilots for a deadly mission. Among them is the son of Mavericks deceased best friend, Lieutenant Nick Goose Bradshaw. Director Joseph Kosinskis Oscar-winning action drama, starring Tom Cruise, Jennifer Connelly, Miles Teller, Val Kilmer, Bashir Salahuddin and Glen Powell

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The gang goes on the infamous sociology and geography field trip to Swanage, during which Neil tries his hardest to avoid the advances of over-friendly teacher Mr Kennedy. Meanwhile, Will takes a shine to new girl Lauren - but she is only interested in Simon. Comedy, starring Simon Bird

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Gladiators, The White Lotus, The Apprentice, Celebrity Bear Hunt, The Fear Clinic: Face Your Phobia, Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less and Alan Titchmarshs Underdog to Superdog

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics judge Britains Got Talent - will it be a yes or now for the return of the hit talent show? They also share their thoughts on Baby Reindeer, Red Eye, Love Triangle, In with a Shout and The Yorkshire Vet, as well as an item about bras on This Morning and a news item on seagulls. From April 2024

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Self-confessed ladette Lucy is on the hunt for the love of a good woman, having already met a male forensic investigator last year in the First Dates restaurant. Terry from east London, who has become comfortable living the single life, with his love for the horses and football leaving precious little time for romance, is in danger of blowing his chances with jeweller and widower Lisa when he goes into a bit too much detail about his solo interests

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch de-thrones Dan the self-proclaimed king, Alice creates a treat for ex-chef Melody, and Jay helps Az make a wise choice as he moves on from his problematic past

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, as Sarah Millican and Nish Kumar take on Jon Richardson and Maisie Adam. David ODoherty is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sam Dushey, the CEO of Shoppers World, goes undercover in his own company. Since taking over the family business, Sam has made it his mission to expand Shoppers World rapidly, and he wants to make sure all of his stores are performing up to his high standards as the business grows. Among the employees he meets are a woman who has worked for the company for eight years without a pay rise, and another who was attacked with pepper spray while trying to stop a robbery

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Tim Betts, the CEO of Muscle Maker Grill, goes undercover in the company he recently bought. Tim wants to make sure the brand is healthy and continues to expand, and he believes its key that as they grow, each restaurant branch follows the same set of corporate standards. Tim thinks its the perfect time to learn whats working and what needs an overhaul, so he meets staff including franchisees, a delivery driver, a food truck manager and a cashier whose flirtatious manner shocks him

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? Charlie, Renee and their daughters love cooking. So a dream kitchen is at the top of their wish list. Drew and Jonathan try to add flavour to their current place while they also search for a five-star home

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Plymouth compete for the £1,000 cash prize. On the first night, beauty therapist Christine and fiance Kevin surprise their guests, while the second day sees young married couple Harvey and Natasha opt for a Spanish theme. Estate agent Paul and his wife Jo try to pull off an ambitious menu for the final meal of the week, but Paul must keep his nerves at bay as the pressure mounts

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In south London, Catherine and Julian kick-off the contest hoping to secure the £1,000 prize with an evening of simple home cooking. Night two sees a display of underplayed fine-dining laid on by Lucie and Alex, while the evening night offers the opportunity for entertainers Joe and Sheila to shine

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: All bride-to-be Ellis wants is a quiet church ceremony - but her fiance Luke, a wannabe superstar DJ, is thinking more along the lines of a huge rave. To add to his problems, he has a mother-in-law to impress - and he leaves everything to the last minute. Can he and party animal best man Tony get this party started? Or will it be a case of murder on the dance floor?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Richard plans an ambitious mountain-top wedding blessing hundreds of miles away in Wales for his home-loving bride-to-be Jody. But when even his best man Kane needs convincing that the idea is a good one, it seems the groom has an uphill battle on his hands

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sharon John, the president and CEO of Build-a-Bear Workshop, goes undercover in her company to work alongside the employees who custom-build stuffed animals in retail outlets and shops, and who work in the distribution warehouse and shipping department

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Karen Freeman-Wilson, the Mayor of Gary, Indiana, aims to reverse her citys economic decline and population loss. She dons a disguise to meet the citys workforce, including a sanitation plant operator, a fire fighter, a police officer and a beach maintenance worker

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling businesss fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? Michelles starter home has been bursting at the seams since Danielle and their three little ones came along. But, after buying it for a top market price, she wants to ensure shes not losing any money. Will a huge renovation courtesy of the brothers secure a high-selling sum? And can the couple compromise on their new location?Short:After buying their current home at a top market price, Michelle and Danielle want to ensure theyre not losing any money. Will the brothers huge renovation secure a high-selling sum?

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Bens careless mistake leaves the guests and crew stranded on a remote beach at night in the middle of a storm. and a new deckhand has many of the crew swooning

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Joe Wilkinson take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Comedian Nigel Ng is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark discovers Elenas guilty secret, but cannot decide whether he should share it with Jeremy, who is clearly very happy with her. Meanwhile, the offer of a business partnership helps him see Alan Johnson in a new light, and it takes the inadvertent involvement of Big Suze to bring matters to a head

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark and Jeremy decide to throw one last party before the birth of Sophies baby, hoping it will provide them with an opportunity to reignite their relationships with Dobby and Elena. Comedy, starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Sketch comes to the aid of Shane, who has an unusual tattoo based on a shampoo slogan, while Glen helps Harri correct his regretable fast-food ink. Plus, Alice tackles a webbed toe

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Lee Mack and Joe Wilkinson take on Jon Richardson and Jessica Knappett. Comedian Nigel Ng is in Dictionary Corner. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Young, co-owner of custom signs company Yesco, goes undercover wanting to ensure that each franchise location follows corporate protocol and is meeting the needs of its staff. He meets staff members who have suffered bereavements, heart attacks and homelessness but still remain dedicated to their jobs

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Scott Gerber, the chief executive of hospitality business the Gerber Group, goes undercover in his own company. As the business continues to expand, Scott wants to make sure it is maintaining the reputation that made it such a success. Along the way, he hears some home truths that are hard to handle

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? Jonathan and Drew come up with a way to dazzle Dennis and Maries current home - including an unorthodox way of getting rid of an armchair. Drews determined to deliver on his promises but will his advice have legs? Short:Jonathan and Drew come up with a way to dazzle Dennis and Maries current home - including an unorthodox way of getting rid of an armchair

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Guernsey and Alderney compete for the £1,000 cash prize. Sophie and Turk begin the competition with a locally sourced menu, but dessert proves to be their downfall. Night two sees Dudley and Karla make South African-inspired food which is too spicy for some, and the final evening sees Bobbie and Jamie treat their guests to a simple fish dinner

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Miguel from Venezuela and Charlotte kick off the competition in the West Country with a Venezuelan menu. Pansy and Rob host the second night, with Pansy convinced her sophisticated menu will impress their guests. The final hosts are alternative healing practitioners Elle and Dave, who grow their own veg, only eat organic and dont eat wheat. All hope to impress their rivals and secure the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Roller-hockey enthusiast Luke Jarvis is given £12,000 to plan his wedding to family-oriented bride-to-be Jaydene Coomber, coming up with a skating-themed ceremony that is all about fun, and a three-day stag party that blows a significant hole in his budget. However, his fiancee is hoping for a much more muted affair, namely a traditional service at the same church where her parent and grandparents got married, and it remains to be seen how shell react to strapping on roller-skates to glide down the aisle

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Holiday park entertainments manager Mathew Hill plans a pirate-themed ceremony for his wedding to dancer fiancee Jamie-Lee Johnson, who simply wants a traditional day and to be the centre of attention for once. With the best man not fully onboard with the grooms swashbuckling ideas and the weather threatening to play havoc, the chances of a smooth wedding day seem slim

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Scott, CEO of clothing retailer New York and Company, disguises himself to go undercover among his own employees seeking ways to keep the business in vogue and increase profitability. He meets up with a sales associate, a fitting room stylist, a stocker and an assistant manager

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Renee Maloney, the co-founder of art class studios Painting with a Twist, goes undercover in her own organisation to make sure that her growth projections for the company are possible. She works in disguise with her own staff including an art instructor, a trainee manager and a franchise owner

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJs Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: The DIY duo are back for series four! You know the drill: expect funky furnishings, hardware hysteria and, of course, problematic properties. Can Jonathan and Drew reverse more housing screw-ups? Danielle and Steve bought what they thought was the perfect suburban home. But they were wrong. As their circumstances shifted, so did their love of the house. The twins must now tackle terrible tiles and a costly fix in the kitchen. And when the couple go house hunting, theres a home so good, theres instant tears. But can they afford it? Short:The twins tackle terrible tiles in Danielle and Steves suburban home. And when the couple go house hunting, one home causes instant tears. But are they happy ones or not?

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Chef Anthony tries to shake off his past mistakes as he takes on the most dietary restrictions of the charter season yet.

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy believes he has thought of a way to win back Elenas affections as her marriage to Gail approaches. Thirty five-year-old Ian, from Co Durham, is full of contradictions, which include working as a gas fitter while also running an art gallery with a champagne bar. it remains to be seen if similarly-aged medical lab assistant Michaela could be the woman to love all of his quirks

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick (2022)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve contestants begin the battle to be named Britains best amateur baker by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, who have created 30 new tasks to test their baking skills and creativity. The first signature challenge takes the bakers back to basics with a British classic, while the technical sees them tackle a popular little cake with a fatless sponge and tricky chocolate work. Finally, the competitors must impress the judges with their first showstopper, but there is nowhere to hide. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Culinary competition in which amateur cooks compete in a variety of culinary challenges, hoping to be crowned Britains best amateur baker. Contestants create a wide range of sweets and pastry dishes, before the judges cast a critical eye over their efforts. Each week, the bakers must prepare their own take on a tried-and-tested recipe, complete a technical challenge with minimal instructions, and finally pull out all the stops to create an outstanding showcase of their talents

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: James crosses over the Irish Sea to Northern Ireland, where he is joined by famous local chef Paul Rankin. Their first port of call is the Giants Causeway, where James cooks a fish stew for the crowds, followed by a visit to a family farm in Limavady, where Paul learns how their award-winning rapeseed oil is produced. Things get competitive as the chefs compete in a hovercraft race, and finally James takes to the seas to fish for mackerel

programme.title: James Martins Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Fellow chef Paul Rankin gives James a personal tour of Northern Irelands capital city - his home town of Belfast - before the duo enjoy a spot of golf. James pitches up his mobile kitchen right on the green to whip up a tasty dish with bacon, scallops and apples with onion rings, and later cooks a Northern Irish classic - beef with champ, charred onions and parsley oil. Next, James is in Craigavon to visit Danni Barry, the first woman named the best chef in Ireland, who rustles up a dessert using local ingredients. Finally, the presenter visits Strangford Lough to fish for langoustines

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Heroes
programme.desc: The chef visits East Anglia, Lincolnshire and the Midlands. He samples a host of regional specialities including Norfolk black turkeys, Lincolnshire chine, pork pies and Stilton. He then rustles up wild mushrooms and devilled kidneys on toast and an organic leek and lemon thyme cannelloni

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food

He also prepares a speedy lemony courgette linguine, sticky lamb chops as a single-pan dish, and cherry chocolate mousse for dessert

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, making a tender lamb shoulder for a sharing feast that is super-quick to prepare, as well as green spaghetti, a one-pan fish dish and apple crumble cookies.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve contestants begin the battle to be named Britains best amateur baker by judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood, who have created 30 new tasks to test their baking skills and creativity. The first signature challenge takes the bakers back to basics with a British classic, while the technical sees them tackle a popular little cake with a fatless sponge and tricky chocolate work. Finally, the competitors must impress the judges with their first showstopper, but there is nowhere to hide. Presented by Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Culinary competition in which amateur cooks compete in a variety of culinary challenges, hoping to be crowned Britains best amateur baker. Contestants create a wide range of sweets and pastry dishes, before the judges cast a critical eye over their efforts. Each week, the bakers must prepare their own take on a tried-and-tested recipe, complete a technical challenge with minimal instructions, and finally pull out all the stops to create an outstanding showcase of their talents

programme.title: Ottolenghis Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Chef Yotam Ottolenghi travels the southern and eastern Mediterranean to explore its cuisine. He begins his journey in Marrakech, Morocco, tasting its wide variety of street food and soaking up the atmosphere of Jemaa el-Fna square, the citys largest communal dining area. Inspired, he returns to his rooftop kitchen and prepares a barbecued leg of lamb with almonds and orange blossom sauce, and herb-infused couscous with grilled cherry tomatoes, before meeting the Berbers, the countrys indigenous people, in the Atlas Mountains

Western, starring Gregory Peck, Pat Quinn and Robert F Lyons

Action comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes, Jennifer Lopez and Chris Cooper

programme.title: The Jigsaw Man (1984)
programme.desc: A former British Secret Service agent who defected to Russia during the Cold War has his face surgically altered so he can return to England on a mission to steal top secret documents. However, the cunning spy decides to play MI6 and the KGB off against each other for his own gain. Espionage thriller, starring Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier, Susan George and Robert Powell

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Retired builder Roger has fallen 13ft from his daughters roof and the trauma team is concerned he may have badly injured his head, back and neck. Folk musician Tad, 29, has come to AandE after developing a dangerously high heart rate, and doctors must use an electric shock to try to get it back to normal. Meanwhile, 69-year-old Richard is brought in after being found unwell at home by his son, and there are fears he has developed a serious infection

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A man has a blackout driving a van and crashes into a telegraph pole. This is the second time it has happened in as many weeks and paramedics are keen to find out why

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors cant guarantee he wont lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into AandE by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. Lucy has had a trampolining accident in her familys garden and medics fear the 13-year-old may have suffered a neck injury

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats two trauma patients arriving by helicopter on the hospitals new helipad. Eric, 75, collapsed shortly after falling from a ladder while pruning trees in his garden. He is stabilised and put in an induced coma while a CT scan is used to determine any internal injuries. IT consultant Mihhail, 29, is admitted after crashing his motorbike at high speed and again a CT scan is employed to look for hidden wounds. Hes later transferred to the Intensive Care Unit while specialists decide how to repair the damage to his liver and stop his internal bleeding. Meanwhile, 22-year-old performing arts student Maria complains of chest pains and 82-year-old Rusty is treated for a broken ankle sustained in a road accident

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks camping connoisseurs go in search of the perfect pitch in north Wales. Their first stop is the coastal campsite of Porth Iago on the Llyn Peninsula

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. Henry is barn searching on his doorstep in Oxfordshire, while Simon makes the long journey down from Liverpool. Its a tank off! as Simon hatches a wacky plan to turn some old tanks into a pizza oven, while Henry turns a redundant water tank into a mobile shelving unit

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. The boys head to Suffolk to meet Margaret, an avid collector who is also a former mayor, so they need to be on their best behaviour

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the Horseshoe Hotel in Egton Bridge, North Yorkshire, where a fancy machine causes confusion but breakfast and eco toiletries prove a big hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle continues in Market Bosworth at the Dixie Arms, run by Alex, whose blingy beds impress two of the guests. However, not all of the facilities are quite as successful

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Bradburys of Blackpool, where former flight attendant Matt is hoping to change his guests perceptions of the seaside town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Little Oakhurst, in Stonyhurst near Clitheroe, run by husband-and-wife team Andy and Joanne. The guests are immediately captivated by the stunning location, with views over the Lancashire countryside, though the optional and additional breakfast brings some mixed reviews. At feedback time, it becomes clear that glamping isnt for everyone

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees Craig and Greta keen to get to the bottom of facilities faults, before Alex points the finger at them about some unsavoury feedback scores. Matt wants to question Alexs cleanliness comments, and Joanne and Andy have some beef over their breakfast scores

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Greater Manchester, the first host, 55-year-old DJ and hairdresser Mozz from Bury, makes garlic Stilton mushrooms and poached pear, and pulls out all the stops with a party atmosphere and his entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, voiceover artist and film extra Matt cooks up a Jewish Friday night supper, including his mums traditional chicken soup

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Budding author and mum-of-five Cleona is next to host in Manchester, hoping a menu based on her Jamaican roots will get her guests onside

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Australian radio content director James hosts the fourth party in Manchester, hoping his menu containing Chinese cuisine and his mums cake recipe can land him the top spot

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Events boss Sharon hosts the final night in Manchester. With her hearty decadent menu on offer, she has to win over Cleona after a bust up on from Cleonas turn as host. Sharons skills and decorum are put to the test, though Mozz, Matt and James are on hand for moral support

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition commences at Churchills Hotel in Barnsley, where the guests are treated to a day out at a nearby mill and the hotels first ever breakfast service

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at Darnells Farm Luxury Glamping in Ross-on-Wye, Herefordshire, where arachnophobe Snehal checks every corner of his lodging for unwanted eight-legged guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners stay the night at Hatton Court Hotel in Gloucester, a country style establishment that at first proves a hit - until cleanliness concerns, sleepless nights and missing breakfast items leave them disappointed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth and final visit is to the Ladbrooke Hotel in the heart of Birmingham, where manager Snehal Lakhani claims he accepts nothing less than perfection. A room with a broken window proves far from flawless for Natasha and Laura, while Danni and Graham are concerned about the proximity of a train line to their bedroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day of the competition, Churchills Hotels Jeff Brown and Vicky OLoughlin are first to face the feedback and Jeffs keen to turn down the heating woes. Plus, Snehal from the Ladbrooke Hotel has a bone to pick with all of the BandBers. After some frank discussions, the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer offer their expert advice to more potential homeowners. In Oxfordshire, first-time buyer Tim hopes Kirstie can put an end to his two-year search for a flat, while globetrotting couple Phil and Louise have decided to settle in Gloucestershire with their baby daughter Annabelle, enlisting Phils help to find a suitable property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Chippenham to help Tim and Sonia decide whether to sell or renovate their home. Eight years ago, the couple moved into Tims childhood home to take care of his elderly mother. Nowshe has died, Tim and daughter Ella are ready to move on to a fresh start in a new home, but Sonia thinks with a little work they can start their new chapter without having to move

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of Bedfordshire Police around the clock as they investigate a number of major crimes. A man emerges from a hotel lift covered in blood and holding a fire extinguisher, before approaching the reception desk and shouting that he has killed someone. Cameras follow every twist and turn as detectives try to work out what really happened at the hotel close to Luton Airport, which has suddenly become a chaotic and bloody crime scene

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Freddie, seven, is brought in after falling several metres from a tree in his garden. Hes been in and out of consciousness and doctors are concerned he could have head or spinal injuries. Martin, 66, collapsed at home and spent the night on the floor, and hes now experiencing poor eyesight and dizziness. The stroke team diagnoses a blood clot, but because of the amount of time that has passed since the incident, clot-busting drugs will have little effect. Elsewhere, eight-year-old Jayden has come to St Georges with swollen eyes, the result of severe hay fever

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Will, 13, arrives by helicopter after a serious collision with someone during a game of baseball, while in the paediatric area, teenage parents Connor and Saffron have arrived with their six-month-old daughter Amira, concerned about the irregular heartbeat their GP spotted. Pizza delivery rider Chris, 20, is brought in to resus following a motorbike accident. Series following life inside the AandE department of St Georges Hospital, south-west London

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien find unique items in Gloucestershire, including a rare pre-Second World War exercise bike and a huge set of farmyard scales used to weigh potatoes

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Brighton to meet recycler Cat, who has tons of junk in a series of sea containers. Henry salvages a childrens scooter, while Simon constructs the largest corkscrew that valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan has ever seen

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Becketts in Southsea, Portsmouth, where parking problems, a duvet disaster and a noisy night leave host Terence facing less than perfect scores

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at the Westby Guest House in Boscombe, where Duncan and Jessies strict house rules are not to everyones liking - and the breakfast is quality over quantity

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Paul and Tracey host the third visit of the week at Newell Restaurant and Rooms in Sherborne, Dorset. Terence is taken with the blissful bedding but Duncan has a substandard slumber - and a communal coffee zone proves controversial

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the final visit of the week, the BandBers embrace the great outdoors at Lydcott Glamping in Cornwall. Hosts Emma and Rich think their cabins will set them on the path to victory

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet up on payment day to settle their differences. In a particularly emotional discussion, there is plenty of finger pointing before the payments are revealed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host from in and around Newcastle is 32-year-old ballroom dance instructor Stuart, who plans a rainbow-themed night. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night of the competition from in and around Newcastle, and the turn of Adam to host. He opts for an evening of fine dining and up-market gastro pub food

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nursing student Harriet hosts the third night of the competition in Newcastle, throwing a dinner party entirely themed around her equestrian hobby

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition from in and around Newcastle, sees Mo act as host with a menu of traditional South African dishes. programme.title: Four in a Bed

After check-in, Noreen and Chloe give the bedding the brush-off, and Ian and Beverley think the hosts have lost their bottle when it comes to the in-room refreshment. A historical afternoon out at a nearby battlefield earns the hosts some royal points, but over drinks, a breakfast bombshell really scrambles the guests expectations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The best-value BandB contest continues at the Bull Hotel in Stony Stratford, Buckinghamshire, where Ian and Bev are not impressed by the decor, and breakfast is a topsy-turvy affair

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals reunite to discuss their feedback and there are plenty of grievances, not least Mac and Jo wanting to get to the bottom of Ian and Bevs dressing gown comment. programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house hunting in Northern Ireland, with Phil searching for properties in Bangor that would be suitable for Lynn, a woman who has been blind since birth. Meanwhile, Kirstie is in Belfast helping a couple of busy doctors who hope to find a home together before they tie the knot

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help Amy and Brian from Newtownards, Northern Ireland decide whether to move or renovate their five-bedroom chalet bungalow. After 50 years in the same house, Brian has had enough and wants a more spacious home in the countryside with more storage for his hobbies. Kirstie comes up with a plan to make their existing home feel brand new while Phil heads out to find a future-proof property with accessible ground floor accommodation to suit Brians health needs

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: The death of a former convict suspected of being involved in the trafficking of Nazi memorabilia raises suspicions for Blanca and her colleagues. Blanca is sent undercover on a course for blind divers to investigate whether a diving centre is the hub for a larger crime ring. Away from the case, she is still confused by her feelings regarding Liguori and Nanni, and bereft without her beloved guide dog. In Italian

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside the AandE department of St Georges in south-west London. Carole, aged 45, is brought in after collapsing at home with chest pains. Tests reveal she has suffered a heart attack, so she undergoes an emergency procedure to unblock an artery. Philip, a 53-year-old psychiatrist, is rushed in following a seizure. Doctors suspect he might have suffered a stroke, but when it is revealed he was diagnosed with lung cancer several months earlier, registrar Chris believes it could be related. Finally, doctors treat 25-year-old Lucy, who is suffering severe headaches brought on by the build-up of excess spinal fluid in her head

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team at St Georges treats patients who have injured themselves through work or play. Iain, 60, is rushed in by ambulance after falling 10ft off a ladder on to his head while fixing an air-conditioning unit. He has a deep laceration above his right eye and doctors cant guarantee he wont lose some of his sight. Student teacher Lloyd is helped into AandE by his friend Mollie after injuring his foot on an inflatable obstacle course on their last day at university. programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats two trauma patients arriving by helicopter on the hospitals new helipad. Eric, 75, collapsed shortly after falling from a ladder while pruning trees in his garden. He is stabilised and put in an induced coma while a CT scan is used to determine any internal injuries. IT consultant Mihhail, 29, is admitted after crashing his motorbike at high speed and again a CT scan is employed to look for hidden wounds. Hes later transferred to the Intensive Care Unit while specialists decide how to repair the damage to his liver and stop his internal bleeding. programme.desc: The team meets Will, who needs Lous help covering a famous face in an intimate place, and Jay assists glamour model Gigi, who has the initials of two exes on her chest. Fellow customer Chris has a tattoo dedicated to his best friends mum, and Anya also needs assistance as she drunkenly got a matching tattoo with a guy she met on holiday, but has no idea who he is

programme.title: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: The housemates prepare to leave Miami, with Pauly D and Vinny each having a last date in the city, and Sammis final supper with Ronnie turning into a fight. A session in the hot tub also erupts into a series of arguments after Jenni stirs up trouble between Pauly and The Situation

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Down in North Carolina, Ceaser meets Dutchesss entire family and faces questions about marriage and kids. Cease gets a call and is surprised to hear that OS**ts reign has come to an end

programme.title: Black Ink Crew New York
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess cut their trip short to pick up OS*** from the New York City prison he has been locked up in. Alex and OS*** face each other for the first time since he went to jail

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The Artists step aside and put faith in their Coaches as Cleen and Christian each tattoo four Canvases in a head-to-head marathon. The Artists must then tattoo galaxies

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: The programme focuses on the tragic events of September 1961, when a Douglas DC-6 operated by Transair Sweden, carrying Dag Hammarskjold, the second Secretary-General of the United Nations, crashed en route to cease-fire negotiations in Northern Rhodesia during the Congo Crisis. All 16 passengers and crew members were killed.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Tension is in the air as the airports multi-billion-dollar expansion project hangs by a thread. Heightened security measures anger passengers, stranded for over 48 hours. programme.title: King Arthurs Britain: The Truth Unearthed
programme.desc: With access to a major new excavation on the Tintagel peninsula in Cornwall, Professor Alice Roberts pulls together the latest evidence to reveal what Dark Age Britain was really like. Long known to have been a Dark Ages settlement, the new evidence reveals that Tintagel was also a seat of power, and Alice explores the link between the location and Arthurian legend, tracking down the early sources for the period and the first written reference to King Arthur

programme.desc: The story of Englishman John Ward, who became tired of the drudgery and poverty of the English Navy. programme.title: 10 Mistakes That Sank the Titanic
programme.desc: Documentary examining the chain of events that led to the maritime disaster in April 1912, when the ship struck an iceberg in the north Atlantic and went down with around 1,500 passengers and crew. From the procedure for fixing rivets into the ships bows, the delays in its construction that pushed the maiden voyage into perilous iceberg season, and the astonishing fact that the lookouts on watch that fateful night had no access to binoculars, this film reveals the 10 key mistakes that conspired to sink the supposedly unsinkable Titanic

programme.title: FBI Files

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Barrister Robert Rinder return to examine more real-life cases, looking at the events leading up to crimes, going through the police investigations and summing up the trials. The first edition features two off-duty police men who showed extreme bravery after interrupting an armed robbery at a jewellers in Newark, Nottinghamshire, as well as a look at the the apparent suicide of a mother-of-three

programme.title: Love, Honor, Betray
programme.desc: When Butch Halley finds love with Sunny, he cant wait to start their new life together. But sinister rumours soon threaten to tear the family apart

programme.title: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A college coed disappears, and her family launches a desperate investigation to find her. What they discover will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When the body of Dawn Meade is found on the side of the road, detectives must determine if it is an accidental death or something more sinister

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime
programme.desc: A case from May 1997, when eight-year-old Jamie Lavis was on the Manchester bus Darren Vickers was driving just prior to his disappeance. Vickers joined the hunt and spoke on television - but was hiding an awful truth. Bones from Jamies torso were eventually found hidden in bushes on a golf course five months later, and evidence led detectives back to the driver

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: In 1997, 78-year-old Jean Schwarzkopf was murdered in Florida. The retirees husband owned a jewellery business - was she murdered for her diamonds?

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: How, seven years into their marriage, something changed between a husband and wife - and a dirty secret at work led to a deadly confrontation

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: A landlord in Birmingham, Alabama, approaches his rental home to inspect a broken window when he suddenly hears a baby crying. What he discovers inside will haunt two families for the rest of their lives

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: Robert Rinder examines the case of 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon, who disappeared in 2004. Although police soon suspected murder, her killer was not convicted until July 2012

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Evil Lives Here

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Danyall White recounts the true story of her brother Richard. Danyall always thought he was a prankster who told stories, but when his stories started getting more and more violent, she slowly realised he was hiding a monstrous secret

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: The case of family man Dr David Cornbleet, found brutally murdered in his office. Police relied on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to the killer

programme.title: Forensic Detectives

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: How killers who poison their victims rely on their targets trust to commit their crimes, and why they sometimes murder more than once

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: Faking It: Tears of a Crime

programme.title: American Monster

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: The fatal stabbing of Charlene Wold by her 28-year-old son Logan Reese, who then took police on a chase through three counties while shooting at squad cars

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death
programme.desc: In rural Missouri, the body of a young woman lies dead on a deserted dirt road only days before her wedding. Police uncover surprising secrets in her fiances life.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and Serhat Ahmet tour East Anglia hunting for antiques. As their quest continues, Serhat meets the great nephew of a woman who broke the social norms of the day to go to fight on the front line. Catherine, meanwhile, gets to sample a local delicacy that sounds rather unappealing, but has sustained the local population for centuries. The competing duo then head to a picturesque spot by a windmill to watch their items go under the hammer at auction

programme.desc: Drew seeks out a combination of knowledge and experience when he visits four family businesses. He discovers an exciting array of items to sell on

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew indulges his Georgian obsession in Lincoln, where he falls for a Regency wine cooler. And a bungalow near Stockport hides a vast collection

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew finds rare pieces that have stood the test of time. They include an 18th century cabinet in superb original condition and a chest from the Vatican

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As their quest for bargains continues, Serhat Ahmet is on the hunt once more for ceramics, while Catherine Southon has her eye on a more eclectic mix of items. Serhat makes some new four-legged friends and finds out about a refugee fleeing his war-torn country who became a local legend in his adopted home town thanks to his crazy stunts and feats of strength. Catherine also gets a taste of a high-speed motorsport and goes for a ride from which she might never recover

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Serhat Ahmet and Catherine Southon start the final lap of their antiques race on the bumpy backroads of Lincolnshire, heading to their final destination of Silverstone - the home of the British Grand Prix - in Northamptonshire. On their travels, Catherine discovers the history of the most iconic of classical instruments at a school that teaches students how to make them. Meanwhile, Serhat hears the story of how a group of enterprising 18th-century miners helped turn a peak in Derbyshire into one of the countrys earliest tourist attractions

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Silversmith Brenton West repairs a boxing trophy won by an accomplished sportsman and much-loved grandfather. Larry Gaines fought professionally from 1923 and refused to let prejudice hamper his career. He was the first black boxer to fight in the Royal Albert Hall and his family is immensely proud of him. Also being restored are a pair of old football boots and a vintage globe. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus uncovers a rare coin collection and some vintage hair cutting gear. An old sea chest proves to be a treasure trove at auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit more of the programmes most memorable searches, catching up with three people whose lives have been transformed in ways they never imagined. Those featured are Cathie Cutler Evans, who was desperate to find the birth mother who had given her up for adoption nearly 50 years earlier, as well as John Ayton, who longed to find his father Kenneth after being adopted as a baby, and Maureen Charlton, who came to the programme looking for her brother Michael

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit three more memorable stories, including divorced couple Marion Williams and James McDonnell, who were reunited with the son they gave up for adoption as teenagers. The programme also joins Ray Jones in Liverpool as he spends time with two of his new brothers and sisters and tries to come to terms with everything hes uncovered about his family, as well as following Laura Aker on a trip to Nigeria to see her father for a second time, and to meet her huge new extended Nigerian family

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Little Lady Makes Big Money
programme.desc: Angus finds a rare porcelain figure whos worth big bucks. A widow gets a surprise when her late husbands collection sells for a small fortune

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus unearths some ancient Greek and Roman artefacts in Derbyshire. In Kent, Angus is attracted to a curiously well-travelled wardrobe

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in south Wales. Jewellery specialist Izzie strikes gold while shopping, finding a bangle, pendant and earrings, and takes a punt on a Wedgwood pie dish. She also dips into the history of Tenby, a seaside town once a Georgian spa resort. Meanwhile, James accumulates a hoard of shiny items and one piece of silver causes a shock at auction. Later, the pair watch on from the impressive Cilwendeg Mansion in Pembrokeshire as the final auction of the trip takes place in Buckinghamshire
