On their travels, Catherine discovers the history of the most iconic of classical instruments at a school that teaches students how to make them. Meanwhile, Serhat hears the story of how a group of enterprising 18th-century miners helped turn a peak in Derbyshire into one of the countrys earliest tourist attractions

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Silversmith Brenton West repairs a boxing trophy won by an accomplished sportsman and much-loved grandfather. Larry Gaines fought professionally from 1923 and refused to let prejudice hamper his career. He was the first black boxer to fight in the Royal Albert Hall and his family is immensely proud of him. Also being restored are a pair of old football boots and a vintage globe. Presented by Jay Blades

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus uncovers a rare coin collection and some vintage hair cutting gear. An old sea chest proves to be a treasure trove at auction

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit more of the programmes most memorable searches, catching up with three people whose lives have been transformed in ways they never imagined. Those featured are Cathie Cutler Evans, who was desperate to find the birth mother who had given her up for adoption nearly 50 years earlier, as well as John Ayton, who longed to find his father Kenneth after being adopted as a baby, and Maureen Charlton, who came to the programme looking for her brother Michael

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next
programme.desc: Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell revisit three more memorable stories, including divorced couple Marion Williams and James McDonnell, who were reunited with the son they gave up for adoption as teenagers. The programme also joins Ray Jones in Liverpool as he spends time with two of his new brothers and sisters and tries to come to terms with everything hes uncovered about his family, as well as following Laura Aker on a trip to Nigeria to see her father for a second time, and to meet her huge new extended Nigerian family

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.sub-title: A Little Lady Makes Big Money
programme.desc: Angus finds a rare porcelain figure whos worth big bucks. A widow gets a surprise when her late husbands collection sells for a small fortune

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus unearths some ancient Greek and Roman artefacts in Derbyshire. In Kent, Angus is attracted to a curiously well-travelled wardrobe

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in south Wales. Jewellery specialist Izzie strikes gold while shopping, finding a bangle, pendant and earrings, and takes a punt on a Wedgwood pie dish. She also dips into the history of Tenby, a seaside town once a Georgian spa resort. Meanwhile, James accumulates a hoard of shiny items and one piece of silver causes a shock at auction. Later, the pair watch on from the impressive Cilwendeg Mansion in Pembrokeshire as the final auction of the trip takes place in Buckinghamshire

programme.desc: Eighteen months after Russia is blamed for shooting down a new cargo plane over the Atlantic, DS Hana Li is summoned to investigate the murder of an American diplomatic courier at Heathrow. Thriller, starring Jing Lusi, Martin Compston and Lesley Sharp

programme.title: The Last Irish Missionaries
programme.desc: Part one of two. At its peak in the 1960s, over 6,000 Irish Catholic missionaries were dispersed over 80 countries. In the modern day there are fewer than 500, marking the end of an era. Bryan Dobson and Dearbhail McDonald trace the beginning of the modern Irish missionary movement, meeting those who have returned to a changed Ireland after a life of service overseas and those who are still on the frontline in some of the worlds toughest environments

programme.title: The Last Irish Missionaries
programme.desc: Part one of two. At its peak in the 1960s, over 6,000 Irish Catholic missionaries were dispersed over 80 countries. In the modern day there are fewer than 500, marking the end of an era. Bryan Dobson and Dearbhail McDonald trace the beginning of the modern Irish missionary movement, meeting those who have returned to a changed Ireland after a life of service overseas and those who are still on the frontline in some of the worlds toughest environments

programme.desc: Eighteen months after Russia is blamed for shooting down a new cargo plane over the Atlantic, DS Hana Li is summoned to investigate the murder of an American diplomatic courier at Heathrow. The investigation leads her to Londons US Embassy where new American Ambassador Ronald Tillman is hosting a party. Realising the killer has infiltrated the building, Hana and US Embassy security chief Clay Brody hunt them down. Meanwhile, a Russian threat is received onboard a UK Government jet. Thriller, starring Jing Lusi, Martin Compston and Lesley Sharp

programme.desc: Comedy, starring Alex Murphy. Conor and Jock finally reunite after Jock makes a lucky escape from the Colombian prison and becomes a stowaway on a ship bound for Cork

programme.title: My Left Foot (1989)
programme.desc: Biopic of Irish writer and artist Christy Brown, who had cerebral palsy leaving him unable to control most of his body. Born into a large, poor family, Christy is disregarded as a hopeless case by the medical establishment, but encouraged by his devoted mother as he learns to write and draw with his left foot. Starring an Oscar-winning Daniel Day-Lewis and Brenda Fricker

programme.title: White Squall (1996)
programme.desc: Thirteen teenagers and a schoolmaster set out on the sailing trip of a lifetime to the Caribbean, unaware the squalls of a terrible storm are brewing on the horizon - and that they will be forced to put their differences aside and battle together for survival. Ridley Scotts drama based on a true story, starring Jeff Bridges, Scott Wolf, Caroline Goodall and John Savage

programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr go all-out designing a Moorish-themed master bedroom. Amanda steers the ship in the bedroom whilst Alan takes charge in the adjoining lounge. However, creative tensions soon arise when Amanda wants to get rid of Alans favourite curved arch which links the spaces together. The DIY duo take some much-needed time out to explore the picturesque coastline of Nerja, but theres trouble at sea. When Alan decides to take a shortcut, he ends up capsizing their kayak

programme.desc: Bruised by his encounter with Nicola, Danny goes to the Crimson Orchid gentlemens club to look for Maia, who Nicola has accused of corrupting Christina. programme.desc: The chef visits Kent, known as the Garden of England, and harvests cherries at a family run farm. From Ramsgate, he heads out to sea in search of Dover sole, and in Margate he celebrates artist JMW Turner and the British love of fish and chips. At home in Padstow, he makes red velvet chocolate and cherry cupcakes, and demonstartes a simple French dish called Dover sole à la meunière

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick explores Glasgows multi-cultural food scene, tucking into Korean and Pakistani dishes and finding out how Italian food became part of the citys fabric. He also discovers chocolate made by an artisan chocolatier, using it to make profiteroles. Plus, he teams up with his son to cook a family favourite, osso buco

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. Among his destinations are a 1930s banking building that has remained unaltered since closing in 2007, a well-appointed set of toilets and a recording studio hidden in a bar. He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)
programme.desc: Youngster Billy Batson is chosen by the ancient wizard Shazam as his new champion, and receives various superpowers. Together with his best friend Freddy Freeman, Billy must come to terms with his new talents in order to stop the evil Dr Thaddeus Sivana. Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Shazam! (2019)

Comedy adventure based on the Captain Marvel and Shazam comics, starring Zachary Levi, Mark Strong and Asher Angel

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Flavia (2025)
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Family adventure, starring Molly Belle Wright, Martin Freeman, Jonathan Pryce and Toby Jones

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Batman (1989)
programme.desc: The masked avenger stalks the streets of Gotham City, waging a nightly war against the criminal element. However, he may have met his match when the citys crime syndicate is taken over by the crazed Joker, who plans to poison the populace with toxic chemicals. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure, starring Michael Keaton, Jack Nicholson and Kim Basinger

programme.title: Batman Returns (1992)
programme.desc: The masked hero returns to face the Penguin, a grotesque crime boss dwelling in the sewers who conspires with a corrupt businessman to make himself mayor. When the tycoon tries to kill his secretary, she returns as vengeful vigilante Catwoman, who soon forms an intense relationship with the dark knight in both their costumed and real identities. Tim Burtons comic-book adventure sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Danny DeVito and Michelle Pfeiffer

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Batman and Robin (1997)
programme.desc: The caped crusader and his sidekick take on the villainous Mr Freeze, who plans to destroy Gotham City with an icy doomsday weapon unless his demands are met. The dynamic duo also have to contend with femme fatale Poison Ivy, who is determined to drive a wedge between them. Comic-book adventure, starring George Clooney, Arnold Schwarzenegger, Uma Thurman and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Aquaman (2018)
programme.desc: The underwater kingdom of Atlantis is ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a huge army at his command, he plans to conquer the oceanic people before taking on the rest of the world. Arthur Curry, Orms half-brother and the human-raised heir to Atlantis, embarks on a globetrotting quest to stop him. But a ruthless mercenary is on his trail, seeking revenge. Superhero adventure, starring Jason Momoa, Nicole Kidman and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Venom (2018)
programme.desc: While exploring space for new worlds, a probe belonging to the Life Foundation discovers a comet covered in symbiotic lifeforms. Following the probes return to Earth, journalist Eddie Brock investigates sinister trials being carried out by the corporation, and after being infected by an alien symbiote, develops superhuman strength and power. Fantasy adventure, starring Tom Hardy and Riz Ahmed

programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. Sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: Weapons (2025)
programme.desc: At 2.17am, 17 children from the class of Justine Gandy run into the night, arms outstretched, never to be seen again. The only child from the class who remains safely in their bed is Alex Lilly. Distraught parent Archer Graff joins other members of the local community in pointing a finger of blame at Ms Gandy for the shocking turn of events. While she pleads innocence, school principal Andrew Marcus seeks answers along with police officer Paul Morgan. Horror, starring Julia Garner, Josh Brolin, Alden Ehrenreich and an Oscar-winning Amy Madigan

programme.title: Final Destination: Bloodlines (2025)
programme.desc: Fifty-five years after her grandparents are involved in a disaster involving a restaurant tower, college student Stefani Reyes is plagued by recurring nightmares of the incident, and returns home seeking answers. Sixth entry in the supernatural horror saga, starring Kaitlyn Santa Juana, Teo Briones and Richard Harmon

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Sean Penn and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Tina (2021)
programme.desc: Born Anna Mae Bullock in 1939, Tina Turner has sold in excess of 100 million records and earned numerous plaudits including Grammy awards and induction into the Rock And Roll Hall Of Fame with her first husband, Ike Turner. She was the first woman to grace the cover of Rolling Stone magazine and dabbled in acting including a memorable performance opposite Mel Gibson in Mad Max Beyond Thunderdome. Following a prolonged period of ill health, Turner intends to retire from the spotlight with her second husband, Erwin Bach. She bids farewell to her fans in the emotional documentary Tina. Directed by Dan Lindsay and TJ Martin, the film invites the singer to reminisce about her turbulent life and career with glowing contributions from friends, family and fans including Oprah Winfrey and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Part one of two. A look at the singer-songwriters life and career, featuring interviews, performances, home movies and personal photographs

programme.desc: Profile of Jackie Kennedy Onassis, providing a definitive exploration of her life, from first lady to widow, unofficial royalty and fashion icon

programme.title: The Fog of War (2003)
programme.desc: Former US Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara looks back over his career, explaining why, after initially supporting the decision to go to war in Vietnam, he eventually chose to speak out against the conflict - a decision that cost him his position. Documentary by acclaimed film-maker Errol Morris

programme.desc: Leon Gasts Oscar-winning documentary charting the challenge of an ageing Muhammad Ali for George Foremans World Heavyweight title held in Zaire in 1974. The film explores the impact of Alis visit to Africa before focusing on the epic fight, dubbed the Rumble in the Jungle, which has gone down in history as one of the greatest of all time. Spike Lee and Norman Mailer are among the contributors offering personal opinions on its importance to them

programme.title: I Am Joe Frazier
programme.desc: A profile of the former world heavyweight boxing champion, a perfectionist who triumphantly emerged from Muhammad Alis long shadow

programme.title: David Frost Vs
programme.desc: Davids first encounter with Muhammad Ali led to an unlikely lifelong friendship that tracked the boxer from his lowest lows to his biggest win

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Taiwanese film-maker Ang Lee, known for Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, Brokeback Mountain and Life of Pi

programme.title: Burden of Proof: Who Killed Jennifer Pandos?
programme.sub-title: I Cant Erase the Things Ive Done
programme.desc: As the investigation ramps back up, Stephen learns about secret legal proceedings and emerging persons of interest. As more information comes to light, the case continues to take an emotional toll on Stephen and his family

programme.title: Kurt Cobain: Montage of Heck (2015)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Brett Morgen explores the Nirvana frontmans childhood, career and tragic death, using material from the Cobains personal archives. Documentary, featuring Kurt Cobain

programme.title: Billy Joel: And So It Goes
programme.desc: Part two of two. The singer-songwriter reflects on his complicated reunion with his absent father and reveals why he chose to reinvent himself time and time again

programme.title: Schmeichel
programme.desc: Documentary profile of Peter Schmeichel, the goalkeeper who won the Euros with Denmark in 1992 and was part of Manchester Uniteds 1999 treble-winning squad

programme.title: Kings of Coke (2022)
programme.desc: How a gang of Irish bank robbers from Montreal rose to become one of North Americas most feared criminal organisations

programme.title: Queen of Speed
programme.desc: A look at the career of French driver Michele Mouton, charting her battle to rise to the top of the male-dominated world of rallying in the 1970s and 80s

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Investigations into inventor Nikola Teslas claims of communication with extraterrestrials on other planets and whether the scientist could have been a human receiver

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Some places in the world, record more Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena sightings than the rest. So many so, in fact, that people flock from all over the world just for the chance to glimpse a flying saucer

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena have only recently been witnessed entering the ocean at very high speeds. Since Earths oceans can be as much as six miles deep, is it possible that some of these UAPs were simply trying to get home?

programme.title: Celts: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Documentary drawing on archaeological excavations, expert commentary, 3D animation and historical reconstructions to delve into the mysteries, myths and arcane history of the Celts. The first of three programmes explores some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded, from collapsed salt mines, to bizarre rituals and lost cities

programme.desc: The archaeologists uncover a 19th-century prison with a difference in Wiltshire. Devizes House of Corrections was one of the first panopticon style prisons built in the UK, with its all-seeing central guards tower which allowed just a handful of guards to monitor and control the lives of hundreds of prisoners. The team want to uncover the prisons lost structures, reveal the secrets of what went on behind its walls and discover just how secure and inescapable it really was

How the Channel Island of Alderney became a pre-occupation of Nazi leader Adolf Hitler and under German control was transformed into one of the most heavily fortified places on Earth. Away from prying eyes, the Nazis also established a concentration camp - the only one on British soil - amid the idyllic scenery of woodlands and silver sand beaches

programme.title: Hitlers British Island
programme.desc: Part two of two. On the orders of Adolf Hitler, the Nazi invaders of Alderney, a tiny island in the English Channel, shipped in more than 5,000 slave labourers to build an astonishing series of fortifications designed to protect the island from attack

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation (2017)
programme.desc: Twelve years after the death of their little girl, a dollmaker and his wife welcome a nun and several girls from an orphanage into their home. There they become the target of the craftsmans possessed creation, Annabelle. Horror, starring Anthony LaPaglia, Samara Lee and Miranda Otto.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment (1985)
programme.desc: Americas most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Jurassic World (2015)
programme.desc: Decades on from the creation of Jurassic Park, a fully operational attraction filled with genetically engineered dinosaurs has been opened on the island. In need of a new attraction, the company behind the park creates an entirely new species - only for it to escape and terrorise the tourists. Action adventure sequel, starring Chris Pratt and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom (2018)
programme.desc: Three years after the destruction of Jurassic World, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing are asked to return to the theme park to save its resident dinosaurs from the islands active volcano. During their mission, they uncover a conspiracy that may affect the entire planet. Action sequel, starring Chris Pratt, Bryce Dallas Howard, Rafe Spall and Toby Jones

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Police Academy (1984)
programme.desc: An American police college lowers its entrance requirements in the hope of attracting new recruits, and in response, assorted dubious candidates turn up for enrolment. A short-tempered instructor is determined to weed out the bad apples, but a riot provides the clueless cops with a chance to prove their worth. Comedy, starring Steve Guttenberg, Kim Cattrall, Bubba Smith and GW Bailey

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment (1985)
programme.desc: Americas most inept cops graduate and are let loose on the streets - under the command of an unscrupulous lieutenant whose promotion depends on their failure. Fortunately for him, their unique brand of policing actually leads to an increase in the crime rate. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, David Graf and Michael Winslow

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training (1986)
programme.desc: Facing closure from cutbacks in public spending and competition from a more successful academy, the police training school calls on its bungling graduates to act as instructors and make good officers out of a bunch of new recruits even more incompetent than they are. Comedy sequel, starring Steve Guttenberg, Bubba Smith, Michael Winslow and Art Metrano

programme.title: Lethal Weapon (1987)
programme.desc: An unstable Vietnam veteran cop teams up with a by-the-book Los Angeles police detective to investigate the apparent suicide of the daughter of a wealthy businessman, leading them to a violent and bloody confrontation with a ruthless drug cartel under the control of a retired US general. Action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Mitchell Ryan and Tom Atkins

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick OConnor and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4 (1998)
programme.desc: Mismatched LAPD detectives Riggs and Murtaugh stumble across a ship transporting Chinese immigrants into the US. As they try to get to the bottom of the organisation behind the smuggling, they find themselves up against a master criminal who is an expert in martial arts and heads a triad responsible for people-trafficking and forgery. Action adventure sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Rene Russo, Joe Pesci, Jet Li and Chris Rock

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Ian Malcolm reluctantly joins a research team on the island where his employer first designed genetically engineered dinosaurs. Meanwhile, a big-game hunter takes the chance to bag the biggest prize of all - a Tyrannosaurus rex. Steven Spielbergs dinosaur adventure sequel, starring Jeff Goldblum, Julianne Moore, Pete Postlethwaite and Richard Attenborough

programme.title: Jurassic Park III (2001)
programme.desc: Palaeontologist Dr Alan Grant is lured to a dinosaur-infested island by a divorced couple who offer to fund his research, unaware their real motive is to find their missing son - and that the creatures on the island are far more intelligent than anyone suspected. Action adventure sequel, starring Sam Neill, William H Macy, Tea Leoni and Alessandro Nivola

programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy try to eliminate stress from the planning of their wedding by applying mathematics to the process. Meanwhile, Raj breaks up with Howard after realising that his best friend is actually damaging his confidence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Howard plan respective birthday celebrations for Amy and Halley. A letter from his brother makes Leonard feel anxious about his own lack of accomplishments. The series takes a mid-season break until the new year.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy subject their friends to a series of secret tests to find out who is most qualified to act as best man and maid of honour at their wedding. Penny realises her true feelings about her friendship with Amy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: The couple reveal some important news to each other as a tornado threatens Chicago, and Mike tries to reunite Peggy and Patrick after they decide to end their relationship. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell and Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.desc: Mike worries about Mollys state of mind when she finds herself at a crossroads with her career and makes a huge decision to give up her job as a teacher in order to follow her dreams of becoming a writer

programme.title: Mike and Molly
programme.sub-title: Poker in the Front, Looker in the Back
programme.desc: The couple hope to stimulate Mollys creativity by moving back to their old room upstairs for a change of scenery - but other distractions are soon found when a suspicious neighbour is seen through the window. Meanwhile, the men chat about their dreams and ambitions over a game of poker

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Pish Posh and a Secret Back Room
programme.desc: Meemaw opens a gambling room, while Sheldon, Missy and Georgie adapt to new living arrangements. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Annie Potts

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Stuffed Animals and a Sweet Southern Syzgy
programme.desc: Georgie has a solution for Meemaws business woes, Sheldon and Dr Linkletter struggle to solve an equation and George Sr gives Missy advice on her love life

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Money Laundering and a Cascade of Hormones
programme.desc: Missy asks some uncomfortable questions at church, while Meemaw and Georgie go into business together. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon kicks Amy out of the apartment so that he can have some alone time to work, she and Leonard bond during a series of science experiments. Bert the geologist replaces Howard in his band Footprints on the Moon, and Sheldon finds Penny to be a surprising source of scientific inspiration. Laurie Metcalf and Brian Posehn guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj finds himself in the middle of a domestic drama when he realises that the woman hes dating, Nell, has a husband, Oliver, who is very upset about their new relationship. Sheldon rents his old room back to have a quiet place to work and drives Leonard crazy by being a model tenant

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon petitions Wil Wheaton to allow him to appear on the new Professor Proton show, so the actor offers a guest appearance to Amy instead. Meanwhile, Penny gets angry when she thinks the female protagonist in Leonards novel is based on her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadettes friends each try different tactics to help her go into labour. Howard isnt happy when he finds out that Bernadette has already chosen their sons name without his input

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While Leonard jumps through hoops to help secure the perfect wedding venue for Sheldon and Amy, Howard and Bernadette have a difficult time deciding which one of them should stay at home with the kids and who should return to work

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny gets the opportunity to spend time with Bill Gates at work, because his business wants to partner with her pharmaceutical company. Leonard, Howard and Raj do everything in their power to also meet the high-tech entrepreneur, while Sheldon thinks hes the victim of an April Fools Day prank

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard runs against Sheldon to be president of the tenants association, while Bernadette encourages Howard and Raj to track down the owner of a drone they find in the back garden

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A brilliant but reclusive scientist, Dr Wolcott, invites Sheldon to his cabin in the middle of nowhere, so Leonard, Raj and Howard go along for the trip. Penny and Bernadette improvise when Amy doesnt like the tame bachelorette party they have planned for her. Peter MacNicol guest stars

programme.title: 90 Day Fiance: Before the 90 Days

programme.title: Zero Stars
programme.desc: Best friends and comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe are visiting locations with the most hilarious, baffling and terribly bad reviews.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Jen has growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain and vertigo. Elsewhere, Juliet is under distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Gerald returns to see D. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his finger. Vinnie has an embarrassing birthmark on his neck.

programme.title: Dr Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Robert is back to see if Dr Lee and Dr Umar can remove his recurring head keloid for good. Justice has small lesions all over her body that get inflamed

programme.title: My 600lb Life
programme.desc: Lacey has ballooned to over 600lbs and must now rally her divorced parents around her and find a way to modulate her moods that wont include binge-eating

programme.title: Musketeer
programme.desc: An old musketeer meets a youth and two scoundrels on the road to Paris. Short drama, starring Kevin McNally, Andrew Lewis and Charlie Allen

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Londoners Lily and Natasha are in their mid-twenties and keen to get onto the property ladder. Currently renting a one-bed flat in east London, they have impulsively decided to buy a 35-year-old narrowboat at a knock-down price that needs considerable work. They are determined to save money and do all the work themselves, but its a significant challenge as neither has any experience of fixing up - or living on - a boat, let alone any knowledge of plumbing, electrics, fabrication work or anything renovation-relevant

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: In Fleet, Hampshire, Stuart and his daughter Freya call upon Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhills help to create a relaxing family garden, incorporating separate, more private spaces. Freya is looking for somewhere to hang out with friends and relax without conflicting with her dad. The garden is small and has to accommodate some storage and a place for Stuart to work and collect his thoughts. They both want to encourage more insects and wildlife into the garden and need the designers help to make the most of their £4,000 budget. Lee and Flo both offer up schemes for consideration, but who has really nailed the brief?

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Flo Headlam and Lee Burkhill head to Yate, Gloucestershire, to create a Palma Majorca-inspired garden to remember Annas husband, Shaun, who before his death from cancer was passionate about the garden, especially his vegetable patch and lawn

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Brecon Beacons couple Rob and Rachel Jones have little time to do any gardening as they are busy raising five children, including an autistic son and a daughter with cerebral palsy. Their garden is a mishmash of unconnected areas that they want to transform into a space that can bring all the family together. Enter Alan Titchmarsh and the team, who set about making their dreams come true, adding a bespoke barbecue, a huge gazebo, a water feature, an area for the teenagers and a range of plants that appeal to all five senses

programme.title: Rick Steins Food Stories
programme.desc: Rick tastes jerk chicken made by the man behind Bristols popular Caribbean food kitchen. He delves into the history of the citys African-Caribbean carnival and witnesses the power of food at a cafe staffed by victims of modern slavery. Rick also dips into the recent craze for fermented foods, making his own version of a burrito

programme.title: Robson Greens Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson and his Grantchester co-star Tom Brittney take a road trip around County Durham, where they go dragonboat racing on the Wear a journey on the oldest railway in the world at Tanfield. They also spend a night in a forest camp, where they forage for food, enjoy a campfire sing-song and a sleep in self-erected hammocks

programme.title: Schitts Creek
programme.desc: Moira is in Bosnia filming the Crows movie that she hopes will revive her acting career, while David attempts to take his relationship with Patrick to new heights

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers continue their culinary journey through time as they celebrate British food. There is nothing like a hearty breakfast to start the day, but this vital morning meal has continued to change and evolve through time

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Follow Lancashire Polices Major Investigation Team as they run a murder case where forensics, digital data, and good old-fashioned police work help solve a brutal killing

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Raw footage and powerful police testimony reveals the tragic reality of policing our roads and a ground-breaking investigation into the Body in the River murder

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A freight train needs an urgent engine replacement after a critical failure, and a crew works on a complex bogie change for a 132 T locomotive

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chef lands in the town that placed Tequila on the map and explores Guadalajara, the city that gave the rest of the world Mariachis and dishes like carne con chilli. He also cant resist a visit to Casa Kimberly, bought by Richard Burton for Elizabeth Taylor, and where they still serve her favourite cocktail, a chocolate martini

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers at Eagle Pass intercept a driver smuggling narcotics over the border, and a group of passengers in Laredo refuse to admit to owning an air compressor full of rifles

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Progreso detain a man who makes a dash back towards Mexico, and the team in Laredo uncovers methamphetamine concealed in a shipment of landscaping stone

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: For his second adrenaline-fuelled challenge, the racer tries to set the world record for riding a motorcycle on water. With the help of a Cambridge professor and a team of marine engineers, he attempts the feat at Bala Lake in Snowdonia, with extra fittings on his bike that should enable it to skim across the surface. Crashing is inevitable, so Guy endures a rigorous training schedule to prepare himself for the task

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three motoring enthusiasts head to Spain on a mission to help its struggling economy - but the convertible supercars they take are very expensive and anything but discreet. With Jeremy Clarkson in a McLaren MP4-12C, Richard Hammond driving a Ferrari 458 and James May behind the wheel of an Audi R8 V10, the trio encounter mountain passes, empty towns and an abandoned airport before creating their own street circuit in a deserted Madrid development. Plus, actor Benedict Cumberbatch sets a lap time in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a project to build a car that can turn into a hovercraft and bring relief to flooded areas. Their efforts do not start smoothly, but it is not long before the trio are demonstrating the brilliance of their creation with an eventful journey down the River Avon. Plus, Jeremy grabs the keys to two variants of the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG supercar - the V8-engined Black Series with a roaring 622bhp, and the 740bhp Electric Drive, which is powered by four electric motors. X-Men and Les Miserables star Hugh Jackman is the latest celebrity to take the new Reasonably Priced Car around the test track

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: In the final instalment of their culinary journey through the history of British cuisine, Si King and Dave Myers explore comfort food, discussing how certain ingredients and recipes can give people a sense of well-being, such as chicken noodle soup and a simple fish dish

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chefs culinary travels take him through Mexico City, and Puebla, where he samples Mexicos most iconic dish, the meat stew mole. Later, in the deserts of Oaxaca, he discovers how one of the countrys most famous drinks, mezcal is made

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Celebrity guests Carol Vorderman, Larry Lamb, Jo Brand and Russell Howard join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the comedy panel show in which contestants try to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon presents

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers explore Britains knack for gardening as they continue their culinary journey through time. The duo also look at the countrys passion for growing vegetables at home, a skill that has inspired some amazing dishes

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: When Lancashire police get a call about a cryptocurrency heist worth a staggering £100million, detectives unravel a bizarre conspiracy by a bunch of bungling amateurs

programme.title: Special Ops: Crime Squad UK
programme.desc: Gwent Police tackle the deadly impact of drugs on their community by taking down a violent gang in Newport and hunting down an addicted armed robber

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A busy commuter train undergoes a tough traction motor replacement, while a leaky torque seal sidelines a sugarcane locomotive urgently needed for the harvest

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: The chefs culinary travels take him through Mexico City, and Puebla, where he samples Mexicos most iconic dish, the meat stew mole. Later, in the deserts of Oaxaca, he discovers how one of the countrys most famous drinks, mezcal is made

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A man wanted for serious sexual offences is apprehended in Progreso, and agents intercept a group of migrants moments after they cross the Rio Grande river

programme.title: Border Force: Americas Gatekeepers
programme.desc: Officers in Hidalgo seize over 200 kilos of methamphetamine concealed in a car, and the hunt is on in Detroit for some invasive insects which could destroy the US timber industry

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Speed freak Guy Martin embarks on a mission to fly using muscle power alone, by building the worlds fastest human-powered aircraft. He heads to Southampton University where, in 1961, Derek Piggot became the first man to fly under his own power. Guy teams up with a group of engineers from the same university to build a plane that Guy will ride like a bicycle - will he manage to fly into the record books?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar F-Type sports car on some of Britains finest roads, while Richard Hammond jumps inside the Range Rover Sport and gives it a thorough workout off-road, on a track and in what he believes is its most natural habitat - the lanes of Cheshire. James May goes for a countryside adventure in the New Routemaster London bus brought into use in 2013, which is propelled by a turbodiesel generator and a powerful electric motor. Inspired by the machines they have tested, the trio then meet to celebrate Britains motor industry with a grand finale in front of Buckingham Palace. Plus, former Formula One driver Mark Webber takes to the track for a lap in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to make gourmet food without breaking the bank. They begin with a few weekend treats, rustling up several delicious dishes, gleaning money-saving secrets at the UKs only pub with two Michelin stars and finding out how beer can be as good a match with food as wine. Everything they learn will be put to the test when they help a wounded soldier say thank you to some very important people with a surprise barbecue

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico
programme.desc: For Mexicans, their most revered dishes come from the south, and their Mecca is Oaxaca, where locals still dress in traditional costume. Rick explores the home of Mexicos national cheese, Queso Oaxacana. Its also a land where vanilla grows wild and cacao orchards are harvested to make superb chocolate

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: For his second adrenaline-fuelled challenge, the racer tries to set the world record for riding a motorcycle on water. With the help of a Cambridge professor and a team of marine engineers, he attempts the feat at Bala Lake in Snowdonia, with extra fittings on his bike that should enable it to skim across the surface. Crashing is inevitable, so Guy endures a rigorous training schedule to prepare himself for the task

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The three motoring enthusiasts head to Spain on a mission to help its struggling economy - but the convertible supercars they take are very expensive and anything but discreet. With Jeremy Clarkson in a McLaren MP4-12C, Richard Hammond driving a Ferrari 458 and James May behind the wheel of an Audi R8 V10, the trio encounter mountain passes, empty towns and an abandoned airport before creating their own street circuit in a deserted Madrid development. Plus, actor Benedict Cumberbatch sets a lap time in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May embark on a project to build a car that can turn into a hovercraft and bring relief to flooded areas. Plus, Jeremy grabs the keys to two variants of the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG supercar - the V8-engined Black Series with a roaring 622bhp, and the 740bhp Electric Drive, which is powered by four electric motors. programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: Speed freak Guy Martin embarks on a mission to fly using muscle power alone, by building the worlds fastest human-powered aircraft. He heads to Southampton University where, in 1961, Derek Piggot became the first man to fly under his own power. Guy teams up with a group of engineers from the same university to build a plane that Guy will ride like a bicycle - will he manage to fly into the record books?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May take a look at increasingly popular tall hatchbacks known as crossovers. Having concluded their primary appeal is to caravanners, the duo spend a couple of days in models by Mazda and Volkswagen and try to get a feel for what life is like for the people they believe would buy one. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond drives a pair of exciting Lamborghinis in Italy - the ferocious Aventador Roadster and the limited-edition Sesto Elemento, which carries an eye-watering price tag of around £2million. Two cars are also put through their paces on the test track, with James in a modern re-creation of the classic Porsche 911 and Aerosmith frontman Steven Tyler in the rather less exotic Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson drives the Jaguar F-Type sports car on some of Britains finest roads, while Richard Hammond jumps inside the Range Rover Sport and gives it a thorough workout off-road, on a track and in what he believes is its most natural habitat - the lanes of Cheshire. James May goes for a countryside adventure in the New Routemaster London bus brought into use in 2013, which is propelled by a turbodiesel generator and a powerful electric motor. Inspired by the machines they have tested, the trio then meet to celebrate Britains motor industry with a grand finale in front of Buckingham Palace. Plus, former Formula One driver Mark Webber takes to the track for a lap in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Everyday Gourmets
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers demonstrate how to make gourmet food without breaking the bank. They begin with a few weekend treats, rustling up several delicious dishes, gleaning money-saving secrets at the UKs only pub with two Michelin stars and finding out how beer can be as good a match with food as wine. Everything they learn will be put to the test when they help a wounded soldier say thank you to some very important people with a surprise barbecue

programme.title: Rick Steins Road to Mexico

programme.title: Happy Valley
programme.desc: Things arent looking good for the kidnappers, with Ashley under witness protection and Kevin awaiting trial. Clares plan to cheer Catherine up with a birthday party fails miserably when the family ends up arguing, with Daniel revealing a few home truths. What none of them realise is that Tommy is back in Hebden Bridge, weakened by his injuries and hiding out in an abandoned narrowboat, where he starts plotting to see his son. Sarah Lancashire, Siobhan Finneran, James Norton and Karl Davies star

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a man originally thought to have been killed by his hypnotised wife. Brian confronts the magician named in a tip-off and becomes embroiled in a battle of wits, while Gerry, sceptical of the phenomenon, agrees to be put under the spell of an expert at the Magic Circle - with disturbing results. Sam Kelly (Allo! Allo!) guest stars

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Warren Clarke and Colin Buchanan star as chalk-and-cheese detectives determined to find the killer of a once-promising rugby players wife. Clues point to the husband - but the duo suspect it could be part of a conspiracy. Adapted by Alan Plater from Reginald Hills award-winning crime novels, with Ralph Brown and Susannah Corbett

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The ex-coppers find themselves under the microscope when a psychologist arrives to conduct a study into older men in the workplace - but she soon reveals a more personal reason for her visit. It turns out that five years ago her brother, a cycle courier, was the victim of a hit-and-run that left him unable to recall anything prior to the incident. Now he says he was targeted for the parcel he was carrying, which was stolen at the scene - or so he believes. Sally Phillips guest stars

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty investigates the apparent suicide of Roberts uncle, found hanged at his home, and discovers the whole village where he lived is gripped by superstition. Hetty begins to suspect that the villagers of Readsby - once a notorious haven for witches - are still engaged in satanic practices, and is determined to prove that they were somehow involved

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.sub-title: Heads, I Win. Tails, You Lose.
programme.desc: Harry and Fergus take on a disturbing case - a serial killer targeting random victims and leaving a coin in their mouths.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey decides to make an effort with her in-laws for Darryls sake - but soon lives to regret it. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.desc: Terrys boss urges him to enter the world of politics, so he becomes a prospective candidate for the East Purley Ward, only to find canvassing his area a very tough job

programme.desc: Part seven of seven. While Liz neutralises the threat of the virus, the Doctor learns of an even more devastating Silurian plan.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary examining how Hitler and the Nazi party rose to power in Germany during the 1930s, revealing the greed, manipulation and frightening underestimation of Adolf Hitlers ambition. In 1930, Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law, but just four years later its leader was a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. Leading historians and experts take viewers inside the minds of those hellbent on gaining power and those who tried to stop them. First broadcast in 1997

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.sub-title: The First Six Months in Power
programme.desc: It is 1933 and Adolf Hitler is the chancellor of Germany, but he does not have absolute power as there is still a democratic parliament, a head of state and the rule of law. Hitler calls a general election to increase Nazi representation, but a fire in the Reichstag building is blamed on communists - prompting thousands of arrests of left-wingers. Hitler then calls on President von Hindenburg to act and a decree is passed giving the Nazis emergency powers to ban free speech and the right to protest

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: The final episode examines the infamous Night of the Long Knives in late June and early July of 1934, when Adolf Hitler - urged on by Hermann Goering and Heinrich Himmler - ordered a series of political executions on those seen as a threat to the Nazi regime. The most well-known of these was Ernst Roehm, commander and co-founder of the Sturmabteilung, the Nazi Partys militia, whom Hitler had come to see as a potential rival. At least 85 people died during the purge, although the final death toll may have been in the hundreds

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. He begins in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, encountering thick jungles and tropical swamps as he looks for the people and wildlife whose home is Africas greatest rainforest. His first destination is the remote village of Baka, where Simon experiences a culture based on sharing resources and respecting all living things in the rainforest

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.sub-title: In Luton Airport No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: The Meldrews return from an overseas holiday to find yet another disaster awaiting them - their home has been demolished. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: We Have Put Her Living in the Tomb
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret agree to pet-sit a tortoise for a friend who ought to know better, and an anniversary outing to the theatre ends in disaster. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household echoes to the sound of laughter, as Margaret joins the local amateur dramatic society and Victor begins penning a sitcom script. However, his mother-in-laws bath-time accident and a run-in with British Telecom soon leave the curmudgeonly codger in no mood for jokes. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.desc: Simon voyages across the Coral Triangle, a huge wilderness of tropical seas and jungle clad islands in the south-western Pacific, surrounded by the Philippines, Malaysia and Indonesia. It is one of the most beautiful and biodiverse corners of the words oceans and is crucial to the health of the wider marine environment, having been described as the Amazon of the seas

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels across the Kalahari desert in southern Africa, one of the continents last great unspoilt wildernesses. He begins his journey in a small village in Namibias Nyae Nyae conservancy, where he sets out on a hunt for wildebeest with San trackers, who still live in the traditional way. After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through some of the most remote landscapes on Earth. He begins in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, encountering thick jungles and tropical swamps as he looks for the people and wildlife whose home is Africas greatest rainforest. His first destination is the remote village of Baka, where Simon experiences a culture based on sharing resources and respecting all living things in the rainforest

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels through Patagonia at the foot of the South American continent, a beautiful and rugged land of mountains, ice and endless wild grasslands, His journey takes him up to the huge South Patagonian ice field, through the foothills of the Andes towards the great Grey Glacier of eastern Chile. In Taibo and Jauny, Simon encounters two gauchos, the cowboys of South America, who live isolated lives in the mountains, tending their livestock and braving the storms in a simple hut for months on end

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve

After weeks of dusty travel, Simon ends his journey in the Okavango Delta, where seasonal rains turn the desert in to a vast oasis of greenery

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: In Luton Airport No One Can Hear You Scream
programme.desc: The Meldrews return from an overseas holiday to find yet another disaster awaiting them - their home has been demolished. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.sub-title: We Have Put Her Living in the Tomb
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret agree to pet-sit a tortoise for a friend who ought to know better, and an anniversary outing to the theatre ends in disaster. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The Meldrew household echoes to the sound of laughter, as Margaret joins the local amateur dramatic society and Victor begins penning a sitcom script. However, his mother-in-laws bath-time accident and a run-in with British Telecom soon leave the curmudgeonly codger in no mood for jokes. Comedy, starring Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: A persistent door-to-door salesman makes grouchy Victor Meldrew see red - and an unending stream of junk mail through his letterbox threatens to push him over the brink into insanity. Richard Wilson, Annette Crosbie and Angus Deayton star

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor and Margaret set off for a break by the seaside - but the discovery of a dead gull in their boarding-house bathroom sets the scene for what turns out to be a weekend of sheer hell. Richard Wilson and Annette Crosbie star, with a guest appearance by Stephen Lewis of On the Buses fame

programme.desc: Guys constant presence in the flat continues to rile Lee and and his distrust is fuelled further when he discovers his unwanted housemate runs a lap-dancing club. Elsewhere, Tims new relationship is going well until he discovers what his girlfriend does for a living. Comedy, starring Lee Mack and Tim Vine

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: A holiday in a small caravan cramps the two couples style as Tony cannot believe Deborah is not faking her enthusiasm for sex, while Dorothy has to put up with Garys moods when he pretends to give up smoking. Comedy, starring Martin Clunes, Neil Morrissey, Caroline Quentin and Leslie Ash

programme.desc: Boycies competitive spirit is fired up when a broke Llewellyn challenges him to a pub quiz with a £5,000 jackpot - but sadly, Bryan, Jed and Marlenes general knowledge leaves a lot to be desired. programme.sub-title: All That Glitters Is Not Elvis

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets midwife and kidney patient Sascha, who has to undergo intense dialysis sessions for hours on end, five days a week. This places the mother-of-fours body under great stress and the constant threat of blood clots gives her a life expectancy of just a few years. Determined to help, the DIY SOS team, bolstered by the local tradespeople and volunteers of Welwyn Garden City, renovate her home to include a dedicated dialysis room, offering her the chance of many more years with her family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, in 2015, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. This time they build the final home for decorated former soldier and single dad Simon Flores, whose foot was blown off by a roadside bomb during a patrol in Iraq

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps a couple whose 24-year-old son Ryan has been living in hospital for the last five years, as they renovate the downstairs of their three-bedroom house in Bristol so he can move back home. The house needs a downstairs extension with all the bespoke care provision that Ryan will need, including physio space, a wet-room, a family area and the ability to access the entire ground floor, and if the family doesnt get this work done, Ryan will remain in hospital 50 miles away

programme.title: Tipping Point

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Festive edition of the documentary from 2015 following the work of Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team. A sleigh-pulling Alaskan malamute needs both knees replacing with implants, but his owners are forced to make a difficult decision as he recovers from his first operation. Meanwhile, a springer spaniel is rushed into the surgery with a shattered jaw, so the vets decide to try something new to get him home in time for Christmas. Plus, a miniature dachshund with a deformed foot is given intensive physiotherapy, and Noel gets a surprise visitor

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick performs a risky procedure to save the life of an 18-week-old cockapoo puppy that has fractured its neck following an accident in the garden. He also comes to the aid of Romanian stray Geoffrey, who was found abandoned and emaciated before being adopted by Kent couple John and Stacey, and an accident-prone cat called MK who has fallen from a window

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing and TOWIE star Pete Wicks immerses himself in the heart-warming and emotional world of dog care at Basildons Dogs Trust rehoming centre. Pete returns to Dogs Trust, facing a suitcase of abandoned pups on day one and falling hard for Theo, a gentle Italian Mastiff with a serious heart condition.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Three more expectant mothers visit Leeds maternity wards. Katie, 21, and Jonathan, 22, were not together when she found out she was pregnant, but they were reunited 12 weeks later at the first scan, and at that moment Jonathan realised he wanted to be a good father. Meanwhile, 20-year-old Nicole is admitted with a significant bleed, and the midwives race to fill the bath for 30-year-old Jolanta, who has experienced quick labours in the past and wants a water birth for her third baby

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The documentary follows two expectant mothers whose unplanned pregnancies happened at very different ages. Eighteen-year-old Laura, who has developed gestational diabetes, is booked in for an early induction, but shes rushed to theatre when her babys heartbeat drops. Meanwhile, mum-of-two Nina, 39, and Andy, 41, await a Caesareancaesareanand the arrival of their twins

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The Shipmans drive to Wales for the wedding fayre, and after a momentous trip to the church for the reading of the banns, Nessa tells Stacey her big secret. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: The bride-to-be goes on a hen party, while Gavin embarks on two stag nights, the second of which reveals shocking secrets about his fiancee that could jeopardise the wedding. Elsewhere, the early return of Staceys brother Jason horrifies Uncle Bryn. Comedy, starring Mathew Horne and Joanna Page

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its the night shift for the junior doctors. Adrians ego takes a hit as he bites off more than he can chew, and Ese must solve the mystery of a patients unexplained collapse

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews
programme.desc: Louis interviews some of the biggest names in UK entertainment and is granted exclusive access into their lives at home and at work, beginning with platinum-selling rapper Stormzy. After two years out of the spotlight, Stormzy welcomes Louis into his home in south-west London to sit down for a frank and revealing conversation that covers many aspects of his life; from his childhood to the breakdown of a high-profile relationship, and the pressures that come with being one of the countrys best-loved musicians and role models

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The building crusaders come to the aid of 12-year-old Matthew from Telford, Shropshire, who has been stuck in hospital for three years after suffering cancer and a stroke. programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: As part of the 2013 appeal, Nick Knowles and the team head to Peterborough to help Children in Need-funded organisation Little Miracles, which supports youngsters with disabilities and life-limiting illnesses and their families. However, whereas Mark, Chris, Julian and Billy normally renovate an existing property, for the first time they are knocking down a building and reconstructing it from the ground up - making it worth almost £1million. With just nine days to complete the job, theyll need help - and lots of it. Luckily, tradespeople turn out in force - from both the local area and across the country - giving their time for free

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, West Sussex wife and mother-of-four Amanda fell off her bike while training for an endurance contest, breaking 11 bones, puncturing a lung, and snapping her collarbone and back. Paralysed, she spent the next six months at Stoke Mandevilles spinal unit, while her builder husband Vic looked after the children - but determined to compete again, she returned home in a wheelchair. However, the family home is no longer suitable for Amanda - so thats where Nick Knowles and the rest of the DIY SOS team come in, strengthened by a number of local tradesmen

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles meets midwife and kidney patient Sascha, who has to undergo intense dialysis sessions for hours on end, five days a week. This places the mother-of-fours body under great stress and the constant threat of blood clots gives her a life expectancy of just a few years. Determined to help, the DIY SOS team, bolstered by the local tradespeople and volunteers of Welwyn Garden City, renovate her home to include a dedicated dialysis room, offering her the chance of many more years with her family

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team return to Veterans Street in Manchester, where, in 2015, with the help of Prince William and Prince Harry, DIY SOS launched their most ambitious project yet - transforming a derelict street into a vibrant community for veterans and local people. This time they build the final home for decorated former soldier and single dad Simon Flores, whose foot was blown off by a roadside bomb during a patrol in Iraq

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team helps a couple whose 24-year-old son Ryan has been living in hospital for the last five years, as they renovate the downstairs of their three-bedroom house in Bristol so he can move back home. The house needs a downstairs extension with all the bespoke care provision that Ryan will need, including physio space, a wet-room, a family area and the ability to access the entire ground floor, and if the family doesnt get this work done, Ryan will remain in hospital 50 miles away

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Festive edition of the documentary from 2015 following the work of Professor Noel Fitzpatrick and his team. A sleigh-pulling Alaskan malamute needs both knees replacing with implants, but his owners are forced to make a difficult decision as he recovers from his first operation. Meanwhile, a springer spaniel is rushed into the surgery with a shattered jaw, so the vets decide to try something new to get him home in time for Christmas. Plus, a miniature dachshund with a deformed foot is given intensive physiotherapy, and Noel gets a surprise visitor

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick performs a risky procedure to save the life of an 18-week-old cockapoo puppy that has fractured its neck following an accident in the garden. programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Three more expectant mothers visit Leeds maternity wards. Katie, 21, and Jonathan, 22, were not together when she found out she was pregnant, but they were reunited 12 weeks later at the first scan, and at that moment Jonathan realised he wanted to be a good father. Meanwhile, 20-year-old Nicole is admitted with a significant bleed, and the midwives race to fill the bath for 30-year-old Jolanta, who has experienced quick labours in the past and wants a water birth for her third baby

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: The documentary follows two expectant mothers whose unplanned pregnancies happened at very different ages. programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews

programme.title: DIY SOS

programme.desc: A death row wife finds love with a convicted murderer, and new parents are determined not to let their baby run their lives. Peter Kay guest stars
